programme.desc: The residents determine their future as they make their final decisions regarding post residency positions. Mark admits to Derek that he is torn between his love for Lexie and the fact that Julia can give him everything he's ever wanted.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Flight
programme.desc: Faced with a life threatening situation, the doctors must fight to stay alive while trying to save the lives of their peers. Teddy is presented with a tempting offer.

programme.title: The Closer: Maternal Instincts
programme.desc: A shooting spree in broad daylight leaves two people dead, another critically wounded and a car loaded with marijuana. But there's some confusion as to the identity of the intended victim and the motive behind the crime.

programme.title: The Closer: Waivers of Extradition
programme.desc: After the stabbing death of a woman who was apparently killed by someone wearing a ninja outfit, Brenda and the squad realize they might have a bigger case on their hands than they thought.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: In a case that brings gang violence and social profiling to the forefront, things are not always as they seem. Meanwhile, Sharon offers Jack the opportunity to be a court-appointed attorney in the case.

programme.title: Major Crimes: The Deep End
programme.desc: The media goes into a frenzy over race relations when the body of a young Latino man is found at the home of a white award-winning swimming coach. Meanwhile, Flynn struggles with an emotional dilemma on the eve of his daughter's wedding.

programme.title: Major Crimes: There's No Place Like Home
programme.desc: Provenza faces possible permanent desk duty while the squad investigates the suspicious death of a loathsome ICE agent, which brings them into contact with the residents of an ancient apartment complex nicknamed La Shangri-la.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Backfire
programme.desc: A 19-year-old prostitute is brutally murdered. The squad rushes to reach a deal with the remorseless killer they believe is part of a larger criminal enterprise. Their efforts, however, do not sit well with the judge assigned to the case.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Poster Boy
programme.desc: The team works strategically to capture a spree killer who has put everyone on high alert. Trying to solve the case quickly, Raydor is torn between two seemingly right decisions, each of which comes with major consequences.

programme.title: Sex and Murder: After Dark: Date With the Devil
programme.desc: Recently-divorced mom Ingrid Lyne dips her toes back into the dating scene and meets a man online. But her date at a baseball game would be her last. The next day investigators are shocked by a chilling crime scene.

programme.title: Sex and Murder: After Dark: Sugar Daddy Death
programme.desc: A married Google executive is found dead on his luxury yacht, those close to him are left baffled when the autopsy results are released. The only clue into Forrest Hayes’ death is a sexy woman seen on the boat’s surveillance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dockter Visit
programme.desc: The investigation into the murder of a World War II veteran is impeded when detectives' prime suspect provides a solid alibi, but forensic scientists are able to make a key discovery due to the killer's preference for a distinctive style of footwear.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A woman suffering from depression apparently took her own life. But her sister told police, that a year before her death, she said if anything were to happen to her, there was a note in the china cabinet. Investigators found the note and the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As Fault
programme.desc: A young mother goes missing after a night out. Police suspect foul play and begin looking into the woman's strained family life for answers. When the case goes from missing persons to homicide, a man claims an accident was to blame.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Ties
programme.desc: An esteemed couple is brutally attacked in their home, leaving one dead and the other gravely injured. The survivor identifies the killer but recants her admission leaving investigators probing for answers. A DNA hit captures the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trouble Brewing
programme.desc: A high-priced call girl is murdered on the outskirts of Columbia, SC, and find that a six-pack of beer may be their only link to the person responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Holy Terror
programme.desc: When churches are bombed in a community in Illinois, the people responsible are quickly apprehended. But the bombings somehow continue, leading to this explosive investigation to be reopened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: There was no apparent reason for the young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the medical examiner found the tiniest of clues during the autopsy, investigators were able to unravel the mystery of betrayal and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Room With a View
programme.desc: The victim had been stabbed more than a hundred times and her bedroom was soaked with blood. While her body was positioned in a suggestive way, she hadn't been sexually assaulted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dollars and Sense
programme.desc: Even though the victim was burned beyond recognition, police were able to create a composite sketch from his remains and identify him. Investigators still had to determine where he was killed, however, and who wanted him dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair Line
programme.desc: Doctors don't know why the young scientist is gravely ill. When tests finally reveal the cause, it's too late to save him. Police hope that lab analysis of his hair - showing when attempts were made on his life and what was used - will lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wood-Be Killer
programme.desc: A murderer thought he could cover his tracks by setting fire to the crime scene, but in doing so, he provided the forensic evidence needed to convict him; a new forensic tool used to examine the kindling proved to be his undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naughty or Nyce
programme.desc: Footprints leading away from a car accident point police in a new direction.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Golden State Killer: Hunting Human Beings Part 1
programme.desc: After a 40-year manhunt, investigators finally find their needle in a DNA haystack and unmask a man who they suspect as California’s most prolific serial killer.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Golden State Killer: Hiding in Plain Sight Part 2
programme.desc: The Golden State Killer has been identified by law enforcement as Joseph James DeAngelo. Now accused of committing some of California’s most heinous crimes, this man was hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Constructive Critcism
programme.desc: When a man is found dead, having been stabbed 46 times, and police are stuck sifting through the DNA. After an arduous search, they find their killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home Evasion
programme.desc: A husband finds his wife shot outside of their home and she mutters the name of her apparent assailant just before her death. It takes fingerprint comparison, handwriting analysis, ballistics, and DNA testing for the true killer to be revealed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Survivor
programme.desc: A college student vanished without a trace, and dirt on a pair of shoes reveals the extent of one man's deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insignificant Others
programme.desc: A man's wife had taken her own life, and his college sweetheart had killed herself in much the same fashion fourteen years earlier. Investigators had to determine if this was a coincidence or an attempt to get away with murder twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Driven to Silence
programme.desc: An attractive young hairstylist is murdered in her South Carolina salon, and police are at a loss. A tiny hair and a DNA test force police to take another look nearly a decade after the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Printed Proof
programme.desc: The murders of two publicly known gay activists led investigators to believe they were victims of a hate-crime. The police soon were able to uncover the real motive behind the murders, and it wasn't hate.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Guilty as Charged

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Indecent Proposal

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Find out how the Jokers keep their cover while filming at the mall, and Q's favorite VR word. Plus, learn how long Joe was sore after the table-busting punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: Find out how you make a 'Grandpa Whoopsie' doll, why winter is the perfect season to play pin for the win and where the idea for Q's dirty diaper challenge came from.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: Find out where Joe originally wanted to play hide n' seek, what Q's favourite dessert is, and what the crew was most afraid of during Murr's wig-pulling punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out what singer Q is obsessed with, what Sal's secret ingredient to fake vomit is, and why the Jokers in Yonkers had to muffle their laughter.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Find out which Jokers really wear glasses, how Q was injured the last time he wore his talking brush disguise and what Sal's sole business card actually says.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Baggage Shame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr's old neighbour learns a little TMI about his personal life and which of the jokers Joe would want by his side in a fight.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Remember the Pact
programme.desc: Find out how many mousetraps accidentally went off during Q's turn in 'hold this please,' what made Joe and Murr join 'team skins' in Columbus park, and how Murr's tech punishment made show history.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blue Man Dupe
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal are a little too generous with fellow shoppers at the market, then ask strangers to help them out of a texting jam. Plus, the big loser fights his way, repeatedly, to the best seat in the house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Eggman
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr go incognito to fool unsuspecting strangers, then pop in for a coffee just in time to miss out on a big prize. Plus, tonight's big loser might just crack under the pressure of his rotten punishment.

programme.desc: Kim and Kourtney force Khloe to take a sentimental sister trip to Palm Springs to relive some of their fondest childhood memories from a much simpler time. Meanwhile, Rob meets with a life coach and Kris receives a proposition from a royal family.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Decisions, Decisions
programme.desc: Rob struggles to find a way to be civil with Chyna, Khloe puts Kourtney through a series of tests to cure her indecisiveness, and Kim jets to New York with Kylie for Kanye's highly-anticipated Yeezy fashion show.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Royalties and Loyalties
programme.desc: Kim is torn over maintaining a relationship with Cait and decides to first confirm that her mom's reason for cutting ties is valid. Kendall introduces her sisters to the first openly gay royal whose life story hits close to home with the family.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: MILFs Gone Wild
programme.desc: Scott isn't happy when Kourtney goes on a girls' trip to Mexico to celebrate her birthday. Kim isn't impressed when some less than flattering photos of her time in Mexico find their way onto the web.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Cheers to That!
programme.desc: Kim's confidence is still shaken up from the Mexico trip. Khloe wants mother-daughter bonding time and isn't impressed when Kris has no time for it. Kourtney is keeping her dating life on the down low.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Clothes Quarters
programme.desc: Kourtney plans a fun sister getaway to bond with Kendall, but is distracted by news of Scott's destructive behavior at home. Later, Kim stages an unwelcome intervention on Khloé's wardrobe.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Your go-to for behind-the-scenes scoop, celebrity guests and entertainment conversation.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Confessions of a Beauty Queen
programme.desc: With Savannah and Chase leaving the nest in the next few years, Todd and Julie decide it's time to downsize.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Chase Turns 18
programme.desc: After 18 years of counting down the days, Chase is finally 18! When he tells Todd that he will no longer follow the house rules such as a curfew, Todd decides it’s time to give his son a dose of reality and show him what it’s really like to be an adult.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Anger Management
programme.desc: Todd blames his family for his stress when his doctor tells him that he has high blood pressure. Savannah gives Todd more bad news. Nothing works until Todd finds his own way to relieve his stress, leaving the kids running for cover.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: California Chrisleys
programme.desc: The Chrisleys venture to LA for their regular Beverly Hills haircuts, and for what Todd hopes will be a relaxing family vacation. His plans and sanity are threatened by new levels of Chrisley family craziness when Savannah does something drastic.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Workin' for a Livin'
programme.desc: After Todd unknowingly foots the bill for an extravagant lunch, he wants Chase and Savannah to learn that money doesn't grow on trees. Forced to get summer jobs, the kids struggle to face the reality of a hard day's work for the first time.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: The Great Outdoors
programme.desc: Todd and Chase are forced to experience the great outdoors when Grayson insists on going camping. While the guys 'rough it' in a luxury RV and terrify Grayson with stories of a haunted lake, Savannah and Julie must go back to driving school.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Marriage Redux
programme.desc: Todd and Julie want to avoid a marriage rut when the kids go to college, so they look for new ways to reconnect and put the spark back in their relationship.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: The Houseguest From Hell
programme.desc: Todd's home life is turned upside down when Julie’s pregnant and very demanding friend comes over to stay a few days. Also, Todd tries to bridge the gap between himself and his oldest daughter Lindsie.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Still Chrisley After All These Years
programme.desc: Julie and Todd decide to celebrate their wedding anniversary by throwing a charity event to raise money for breast cancer. When someone mixes up the dates, however, it’s a mad scramble to try to pull off the biggest party of the year.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Savannah's Big ID-EA
programme.desc: When an influential Southern magazine asks The Chrisleys for an interview about all things fashion, Todd insists on trying to control the situation by writing a script for his family to memorize.

programme.title: Chopped: Teen Tournament: Battle 2
programme.desc: Four new formidable young competitors fight to get to the finale, but in the first round, nerves and indecision keep everybody guessing whether all the teen chefs will finish their sausage appetizers.

programme.title: Chopped: Flavor Savor
programme.desc: The chefs are pleased with a first basket full of bright Mediterranean foods, including baby octopus. The entree basket holds prickly greens and meaty fish and the final two chefs are busy at the ice cream machine and deep fryer for the dessert round.

programme.title: Chopped: Bar Fight
programme.desc: Four bartenders who love to cook compete in this special competition to prove that barkeeps know how to keep the flavors coming. An outrageous cocktail is the centerpiece of a fun first basket.

programme.title: Chopped: Tacos And Tequila
programme.desc: It's fiesta time and the chefs are taking on tacos and tequila-themed baskets. Each competitor must make taco-inspired dishes that include a delicious delicacy in the blanco tequila-spiked first round.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Make-Ahead Meals
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is preparing make-ahead meals in anticipation of the birth of her first child. There's a freezer-friendly version of sweet potato and black bean burritos, mini spinach and artichoke chicken casseroles and potato bagel breakfast sandwiches.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: New Mom Life
programme.desc: Molly Yeh makes quick and easy recipes that let her spend more time enjoying her life as a new mom. She starts off with savory Green Pancakes for lunch, and then she's in dinner mode with a hearty Funeral Hotdish and a crunchy Romaine Salad.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Tour de Grand Forks
programme.desc: To begin a day of delicious food, Molly Yeh is making her big fluffy pancakes and sausage for breakfast. Then, for a picnic lunch, meaty prosciutto, cantaloupe and butter sandwiches are followed by the flakiest chocolate croissants ever.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Best of 16 Minute: Spicy
programme.desc: Ree picks her favorite four spicy 16-minute meals from over the years. For the cowboys, there's tex mex fried rice that's ready in no time at all, then a creamy curry Indian-inspired mulligatawny soup, followed by pawhuska cheesesteaks.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: For Pete's Sake
programme.desc: Ree prepares carnitas, mango salad, and a cheesy refried bean casserole.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Five Girls and a Baby

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Freezer Food: Tex-Mex
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is cooking Tex-Mex marvels and filling the freezer with her family's favorites. She makes a big pot of green chile pork stew and a batch of fiesta mac and cheese.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Spring Potluck Faves
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is making spring favorites to share at her church potluck. She starts with get-ahead glazed pineapple ham slices and tosses a primavera pasta salad with lemon and parmesan dressing. Her caramelized onion dip is a crowd pleaser.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: 4 Ways with Beef
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is beefing things up with four recipes that feature meat. She makes a mashup of steak with creamed greens pasta, uses ground beef in taco tomatoes, wraps up mini beef wellingtons and tucks meatballs into a crispy Italian wrap.

programme.title: Ty Breaker: Engaged to a Money Pit
programme.desc: A newly engaged couple bought an outdated house with plans to fix it, but they bit off more than they can chew. Ty Pennington and Alison Victoria join forces to transform their home into a dream entertainment space ready to host their wedding reception.

programme.title: Ty Breaker: When Two Families Merge
programme.desc: A couple tying the knot can't figure out how to fit their soon-to-be family of seven into a single home. Ty Pennington and Grace Mitchell each plot out their own designs to give this whole family the space they need.

programme.title: Ty Breaker: A Baker's Perfect Kitchen
programme.desc: Two former bakers are moving to Atlanta to be closer to their grandchildren. Ty Pennington proposes an in-law suite at their daughter's house, while Sabrina Soto plans to renovate a new home, but they both aim to win the couple over with an ideal kitchen.

programme.title: Ty Breaker: A New Level to Entertain
programme.desc: A couple who moved to Atlanta wonder if they made the right decision when their home isn't appealing for entertaining. Ty Pennington aims to please with a design they'll want to show off, while Sabrina Soto's new home provides a customizable blank-slate.

programme.title: Ty Breaker: A Boxed-In Box of Boxes
programme.desc: A couple loves to host both their Italian and Indian families, but doing it in their small house with too many walls is difficult. Ty Pennington and Alison Victoria have to learn to work together as they find a solution for this overwhelmed family.

programme.title: Ty Breaker: Small Home, Big Family Dilemma
programme.desc: A couple who moved into their perfect home 15 years ago have now outgrown it with their family of six. Ty Pennington and designer Grace Mitchell compete to win them over with a major renovation of their current space or a new home with room for everyone.

programme.title: Ty Breaker: A Sizeable Renovation
programme.desc: A couple living in cramped quarters for too long is ready to expand, but they've grown attached to their historic neighbourhood. Ty Pennington presents his plan for a second-story addition, while Sabrina Soto shows them a new house that's a major project.

programme.title: Farmhouse Fixer: Got Bored and Bought a Farm
programme.desc: Jon Knight must preserve the history of a 280-year-old farmhouse while also making it feasible for modern living. When he learns that part of the foundation is beyond saving, he makes the shocking proposition to the owners to tear down half of the home.

programme.title: Farmhouse Fixer: Third Generation Renovation
programme.desc: A historical house from 1873 is transformed into a vibrant, modern home for a young family. Jon Knight and Kristina Crestin give this family of five a home with fun colors, shiny brass, whimsical bird wallpaper and even a beehive.

programme.title: Farmhouse Fixer: A Bakeshop Kitchen
programme.desc: It's a sugary sweet renovation when Jon Knight and his team tackle a baker's 1910 home. Together, Jon and Kristina Crestin give her a charming, retro kitchen that any baker would love and a luxurious main suite the single mom truly deserves.

programme.title: Farmhouse Fixer: A Coastal Farmhouse
programme.desc: Jon Knight and Kristina Crestin have their biggest budget yet to overhaul an old family home while honoring three generations of memories. They give this family a breezy, coastal home full of sentimental touches and nods to their farming history.

programme.title: David Jeremiah

programme.title: Modern Marvels: Environmental Tech

programme.title: Modern Marvels: Alaska

programme.title: Murder for Hire: A Deadly Imagination
programme.desc: Could a writer's obsession with crime bring her darkest fantasy into reality? A self-proclaimed novelist's plot for her husband's untimely death takes an unexpected turn, and a sting operation reveals the twisted truth.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Figure in the Garage
programme.desc: He was a single dad, a former firefighter dedicated to helping others. When he was found dead in his garage, police needed help. A neighbor's security camera footage revealed a hooded figure, but who was it? Someone was hiding a deadly secret.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Vanished
programme.desc: Young nursing student Michelle Le had disappeared. Something drew her out to her car. As her loved ones launched a very public effort to find Michelle, investigators began their own methodical search.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Connection
programme.desc: They were bright young women out for a little fun with their friends. Kenya Monge and Lydia Tillman didn't know each other but they would be forever related, both falling prey to a smooth-talking stranger with a terrifying secret.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Vendetta
programme.desc: Beloved by his colleagues, Mark Hasse was a fearless prosecutor. He worked to put criminals behind bars and making enemies was a hazard of the job. He didn't know it, but a killer was lurking and Mark wasn't the only target.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Something Wicked
programme.desc: Skylar Neese was everything her parents hoped for, but their world turned upside down when she vanished without a trace. At first, police thought she ran away but hints on social media pointed to a more sinister reason for her disappearance.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets on the Emerald Coast
programme.desc: Marie Carlson was radiant but behind the glow she hid a darkness. For a while, Marie drifted but, then, a pastor and his wife welcomed her into their lives. It was a spiritual awakening which made Marie's disappearance all the more mysterious.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Hidden Betrayal
programme.desc: A civic minded teen is shot to death in his own bed, but just as investigators are closing in on those responsible, a jaw dropping twist leaves everyone stunned.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Murderer on Main St.
programme.desc: A beloved resident of a tight-knit Nebraska town is brutally murdered, leading detectives to look at a wide range of suspects before the trail leads to a killer who lives among them.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Closet Murderer
programme.desc: When a 98-year-old widow is found dead in her entryway closet, a chilling discovery leads investigators to a killer in the community who harbors a dark secret.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Farm
programme.desc: Bill and Shirley Carter had raised a family on their sprawling farm in America's heartland. As their golden years approached, tragedy struck and the seeds of a mystery pitting one family member against another had been planted.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Missing Marie
programme.desc: Marie Singleton was a single mom who fell hard for Andre Jackson, a single dad raising his two kids. The couple married and seemed happy. Then Marie vanished and investigators discovered secrets. Was her disappearance related to her undercover job?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: In the Middle of the Night
programme.desc: After college student Angie Samota was stabbed to death, police had no shortage of suspects. A crucial clue narrowed their list to one name, but it would be years before technology and a tenacious friend came together to help unravel this mystery.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: 12 Minutes on Elm Street
programme.desc: Cousins Nick Brady and Haile Kifer were best friends. To their family, they seemed like typical teenagers. Turns out, the cousins had a secret that led to tragedy. The story divided a small town and sparked a national debate.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Dark Echoes
programme.desc: A weekend trip to an Alaskan lodge turns deadly for a young mother when she's shot and killed by her boyfriend. The death is ruled an accident and the case is closed until an eerily similar incident in Montana drives investigators to reopen the case.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Unholy Secrets
programme.desc: A pastor places a frantic 911 call, pleading for help to save his fiancée who he says just shot herself. As investigators follow the unravelling truth, and look closer at the crime scene, a darker side to this happy relationship stuns everyone.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Death in a Small Town
programme.desc: An 80-year-old woman is found in her home lying in a pool of blood. Her death is ruled an accident but her family suspects foul play. In a tightknit community where neighbors look out for each other, who would want to hurt a beloved grandmother?

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Young Deadly Love
programme.desc: A young man calls 911 to report his fiancé fatally shot herself in their bed. Her family insists she would never take her own life. The investigation drags on for years until an unexpected development leads to a stunning conclusion.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Behind the Locked Door
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman is found in her locked apartment with 20-stab wounds. The Medical Examiner classifies her death as murder. But when the M.E. later changes the ruling to suicide, the decision forces her family into the fight of their lives.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Killer Fetish
programme.desc: First responders are called to the fatal shooting of a 28-year-old woman. Her estranged husband claims their bizarre sex game ended in suicide. Investigators and the victim's family believe this was a cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Twin Tragedy
programme.desc: Identical twin sisters are involved in a horrific crash on the island of Maui. Miraculously, one sister survives after their car plunges over the side of a cliff. Was this a tragic accident or something more ominous?

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Mystery of the Giants
programme.desc: Discover why so many of our cultures refer to giants and if they were myths or could have actually walked the earth. See the tombs and skeletons discovered in Sardinia, where evidence of giants may have been found.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secret Societies: Mystery and Conspiracy
programme.desc: Experts investigate if there's any truth to conspiracy theories that allege secret societies control the course of world history from behind-the scenes, and if true, new discoveries might finally reveal the extent of their global domination.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Search for Noah's Ark
programme.desc: Mysterious evidence on Mt. Ararat could be the long-lost remains of Noah's Ark, and using cutting-edge archaeological methods, experts investigate if these discoveries are hard proof of the Biblical legend.

programme.title: Forbidden History: UFO's of the Third Reich
programme.desc: Hundreds of UFO sightings were reported during WWII and many are believed to be prototype Nazi spacecraft; Jamie Theakston investigates and explores the truth behind Nazi Germany's secret development of advanced propulsion technology.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Dead Sea Scrolls: New Evidence
programme.desc: Experts investigated the Dead Sea Scrolls, which have been kept top-secret for decades by the Vatican. These could reveal the location of tunnel holding billions of dollars of treasure.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Ghosts of the Berlin Wall
programme.desc: Experts explore the mysterious abandoned ruins that were once behind the Berlin Wall, and these new investigations turn up discoveries that reveal the dark truths of East Germany and its terrifying secret police.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost City of Persia
programme.desc: The sprawling city of Persepolis was capital to the first imperial civilization that conquered most of the known ancient world; now, experts use advanced forensic archaeology to reveal the secrets behind Persia's mysterious and dominating metropolis.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Dead Sea Scrolls: New Evidence
programme.desc: Experts investigated the Dead Sea Scrolls, which have been kept top-secret for decades by the Vatican. These could reveal the location of tunnel holding billions of dollars of treasure.

programme.desc: The sprawling city of Persepolis was capital to the first imperial civilization that conquered most of the known ancient world; now, experts use advanced forensic archaeology to reveal the secrets behind Persia's mysterious and dominating metropolis.

programme.title: Forbidden History: UFO's of the Third Reich
programme.desc: Hundreds of UFO sightings were reported during WWII and many are believed to be prototype Nazi spacecraft; Jamie Theakston investigates and explores the truth behind Nazi Germany's secret development of advanced propulsion technology.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Aliens in the Triangle
programme.desc: New evidence could finally explain a mysterious UFO encounter in the Bermuda Triangle. Using cutting-edge tech and the latest underwater discoveries, a team of experts investigate if aliens have visited this strange stretch of water.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Unexplained Encounters
programme.desc: Strange sightings of mysterious lights and orbs are common in the Bermuda Triangle, and to find the truth behind these unexplained phenomena, experts follow new clues to underwater alien anomalies that some believe have ties to the lost city of Atlantis.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Monster in the Abyss
programme.desc: A team of experts are hot on the trail of the legendary sea monster that's reported to live in the underwater caves of the Bermuda Triangle, and using cutting-edge tech and witness testimony, they dive into these chambers to hunt for the deadly beast.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: US Navy vs. the Triangle
programme.desc: New discoveries might finally explain the truth behind one of the Bermuda Triangle's most infamous disappearances, when 306 US Navy crewmen vanished in the Triangle without a trace.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Vanishing of Flight 19
programme.desc: Five US Navy planes vanish without a trace in the Bermuda Triangle, fueling speculation that this strange stretch of water is cursed. Using the latest science and tech, a team of experts investigate why the planes disappeared and where they are today.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Mystery of the Teleporting Shipwreck
programme.desc: When a credible witness claims to have discovered the wreckage of a long-lost ship, experts launch an investigation to positively identify the missing vessel and uncover how it could be more than 10 miles from where it reportedly sank.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Nazis in the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: New evidence in the Bermuda Triangle could reveal the Nazis got closer to America than ever believed, and using the latest cutting-edge technology, experts investigate the truth behind the shipwreck that shouldn't exist.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Beyond the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: The disappearance of the SS Cotopaxi helped launch the legend of the Bermuda Triangle. Today, a team of experts follow fresh leads with cutting-edge tech to investigate if a mysterious wreck off the coast of Florida is indeed the long-lost ship.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Curse of the Armada Graveyard
programme.desc: A cutting-edge investigation into a deep-sea graveyard of twenty-five shipwrecks reveals the dark secrets of the biggest naval battle in history. Using the latest tech, experts follow new evidence into the mysterious abyss of long-lost battleships.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Haunting at Lake Erie
programme.desc: A mysterious shipwreck at the bottom of Lake Erie could be the oldest wreck in America's most notorious ship graveyard, and using cutting-edge underwater archaeological methods, experts investigate new leads in this 200-year-old cold case.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Titanic's Lost Sister
programme.desc: When a sister ship of the Titanic gets embroiled in war with a hidden enemy, the former luxury liner is sent to the bottom of the ocean; new discoveries and cutting-edge underwater technology might finally reveal the secret history of its sinking.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Ghost Fleet of Doom
programme.desc: Discoveries reveal the treasures of a ghost fleet of Japanese ships at the bottom of the South Pacific, and using cutting-edge underwater technology, experts are investigating a top-secret superweapon that could have changed the course of World War II.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: The Universe's Greatest Hits
programme.desc: A new breed of explorers is risking their careers, and even their lives, to lead humanity to worlds we have never seen. From the beginning of our Solar System to the evolution of the Universe, these heroes are tackling the mysteries of life itself.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Shallow Grave
programme.desc: Christmas will never be the same for the two local residents of Noble, Oklahoma whose dog drops a human skull onto their front porch. After six years and no leads, the police must navigate the twists and turns of the victim's past to find redemption.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Scared Silent
programme.desc: When Marshall Dent goes missing on Christmas Eve, the Native American community of Shawnee, Oklahoma bands together. After weeks of searching, Marshall is found in a shallow grave on sacred ground, leaving authorities scrambling to find the killer.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Ashes to Alibis
programme.desc: Residents of Post Falls, Idaho, are shocked when devoted family man Bo Kirk vanishes, and his truck is found set ablaze. Bo's sister blames their estranged father, until released ATM security footage suggests a co-worker with piercing blue eyes.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Branches of Evil
programme.desc: Tray Phelps, a beloved father, son and fiancée was found beaten to death in his own driveway. The small town of Hayti, Missouri is stunned to discover that a web of evil lurks just beneath the surface of the seemingly idyllic hamlet.

programme.title: True Conviction: Justice Under Attack
programme.desc: Surveillance video captures the drive-by shooting of father Nicoh Mayhew. Nicoh's nephew is a prime suspect but has an airtight alibi - he's in jail. Crime scene video and jail calls uncover a murder plot that threatens the entire justice system.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Farming for a Motive
programme.desc: A lively slumber party turns into a nightmare when a loving mother, Dianne Watts, her young daughter, and her daughter's friend, are murdered. The town of McMinnville is turned upside down, knowing there is a killer amongst them.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: The Farmer's Daughter
programme.desc: Bubbly college student and waitress, Mindy Morgenstern, is found strangled and stabbed in her own apartment. Family, friends, and the entire town of Valley City, North Dakota help law enforcement identify who could have committed this violent crime.

programme.title: True Conviction: Justice Under Attack
programme.desc: Surveillance video captures the drive-by shooting of father Nicoh Mayhew. Nicoh's nephew is a prime suspect but has an airtight alibi - he's in jail. Crime scene video and jail calls uncover a murder plot that threatens the entire justice system.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: The Devil's Ranch
programme.desc: A college student goes missing on Spring Break, and authorities work around the clock to locate him. When a man runs a drug checkpoint, the investigation takes a grisly turn into a world of drug smuggling, the occult, and human sacrifice.

programme.title: Wicked Attraction: A Rose Amongst Thorns
programme.desc: A young mother goes missing and the short list of suspects in her disappearance leads right to her own backyard.

programme.title: Surviving Evil: Getting Away Alive
programme.desc: Abducted in her hometown by a sadistic monster, a young Ohio woman endures unspeakable acts of violence and torture. Focusing on her children, she is determined to survive. But the only way she can fight back... is to play dead.

programme.title: What Lies Beneath: In Cold Blood
programme.desc: A loving family mysteriously go missing from their home in Hudson, FL, and loved ones fear the worst. Following a frantic search the family are found, but not all are alive. Courtroom testimony from the trial reveals the chilling details of what ensued.

programme.title: The Shadows of Death: The Oath
programme.desc: In search of a better life, the Shahanazari family immigrated from Iran to Glendale, California. But when the youngest son, Chris, is murdered in a violent home invasion, his older brother Sevan fears he himself is to blame.

programme.title: Diabolical: Queen of Deception
programme.desc: 2011 is off to a rocky start when a beloved Susanville police officer is found dead. What first looks like suicide morphs into a full blown murder investigation when his wife becomes a suspect and detectives uncover a story of love, lust and murder.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: A Dangerous Mind
programme.desc: When maternal senior psychiatric nurse Maria Jordan fires erratic, heroin-addicted junior nurse Denis Czajkowski, it triggers an all-consuming obsession with Maria that culminates in him holding her hostage for an unimaginably bloody 48 hours.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: The Stalker's Imagination
programme.desc: When Katerina leaves her husband, he fights back in imaginative ways to cause her pain, including getting Katerina locked up for a crime she hasn't committed. Katerina must do the unthinkable if she wants to escape forever.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Manhunt
programme.desc: This real life prison break captivated the nation last month and kept a small upstate New York town on edge for three weeks until convicted murderers Richard Matt was shot and killed and David Sweat was shot and captured.

programme.title: Murder by Numbers: Clown Mask Murders
programme.desc: A man is murdered by an intruder leaving his wife to witness a disturbing detail: the killer was wearing a clown mask. And when three more are killed by the same deranged clown, police realize they're dealing with a serial killer.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me: Road to Ruin
programme.desc: A hard-working family man is gunned down while doing a favour for a friend. As Demery searches for answers, he's confronted with a name from his past and an all too familiar tragedy. When more blood is spilled, Demery is pushed to his breaking point.

programme.title: I Am Homicide: Stalker or Lover?
programme.desc: After a woman's body is discovered in a burning mobile home, Charlotte, NC detective Garry McFadden finds himself with two potential murder suspects, both with solid alibis. He discovers that the flames themselves hold the secret to the killer's identity.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: To the Death
programme.desc: When two young men are found shot in an apartment hallway, Kenda must rely on his inner lie detector to figure out which victim was no victim at all. Then, police investigate a murder in broad daylight and nearly get killed themselves.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Fallujah: The Taking of Terror Central
programme.desc: Operation Phantom Fury was meant to be a 48 hour battle but insurgents, armed with IEDs and a stockpile of grenades, fought back. US forces faced one of the toughest urban conflicts since Vietnam as they tried to reclaim the city.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Bulge: Holding the Line
programme.desc: In December 1944, 83,000 Americans are assaulted by 200,000 Germans through thick snow and fog in the Ardennes forest. What follows is the biggest and bloodiest battle of World War II: the Battle of the Bulge.

programme.desc: In what would become one of the most brutal and decisive battles of the Iraq war, a battalion of tanks punches a hole right into the heart of Saddam Hussein's Baghdad in 2003. They are the first Mechanised force to enter a capitol city since WWII.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Desert Domes
programme.desc: Laura Williams is on a mission to build an off-the-grid home in the desert outside of Tucson, Arizona. She builds an earthen three-dome home by hand battling a steep learning curve and Mother Nature.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Island Oasis
programme.desc: Beth wants a beach getaway on the white sandy beaches of Ambergris Caye, Belize. Ken Grissom and his crew transport building materials to the remote island and construct an off-the-grid luxury getaway with the Caribbean water just steps away.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Floating Castle
programme.desc: Marine scientists in Florida hire engineers Nicolas Derouin and Arnaud Luguet to create a first-of-its-kind floating home. They have nine months to complete it, but unpredictable weather and building hiccups may sink this project before it can swim.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Ozark Mountain Lodge
programme.desc: An adventurous couple builds a home with self-sustaining features near the Ozark National Forest. While they both have renovation experience, building on the dangerous mountainside terrain in a location plagued by flash foods will be a challenge.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Nevada Cob House
programme.desc: A group of off-grid-living enthusiasts come together to build a 300-square-foot bungalow in Nevada. With a variety of eco-friendly features, including a solar-powered water pump, this house is a welcome addition to the environmentally friendly community.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Hawaii Dome House
programme.desc: A mother-and-son team pulls up stakes from the crowded confines of Orange County to build an off-grid family commune outside Keaau, Hawaii. With the help of a skilled aircrete instructor, the duo overcomes a learning curve to make their dreams come true.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Appalachian Underground
programme.desc: A husband surprises his wife with a family vacation home on the edge of a Tennessee rock quarry.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Rising Sun Ranch
programme.desc: The Dawgs tackle a ranch house in Alderson, WV. Key items salvaged include stained glass and corbels. In the shop, Mike reuses timber to build a beam table.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Heart of the Home
programme.desc: Tamara Day tackles the battered kitchen of her new property, an 1897 bungalow. She enlarges and modernizes the space while preserving traditional elements of a bungalow kitchen.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: How Suite It Is
programme.desc: Tamara Day transforms a bedroom as she continues renovating an 1897 bungalow. Knowing modern buyers expect a master suite, Tamara annexes a second room to enlarge the tiny closet and add a bathroom.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: From Studs to Spindles
programme.desc: Tamara Day steps in to finish the renovation of a 1890s Craftsman-style home. This home was previously ripped down to the studs by a contractor before it was abandoned.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Book Lamps and Bubble Glass
programme.desc: Renovations on the 1890s Craftsman-style home continues as Tamara enlarges the master bedroom and creates a beautiful study. She runs into trouble when the antique tiles for the bathroom floor are not salvageable. Tamara finds a way to re-use old glass.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Trouble With Cobbles
programme.desc: Tamara continues work on a French chateau as she overhauls a large master suite covered in the tackiest wallpaper she's ever ripped out. She plans to move a bathroom to create an additional bedroom and extend a hallway.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Swing of Things
programme.desc: Tamara continues working on an 1892 Craftsman and struggles to add a master bathroom. Then, she finds a way to repurpose floor boards into a porch swing, but her plan to reuse a clawfoot tub hits a snag because of a narrow doorway.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Fireplaces and Wired Spaces
programme.desc: Tamara annexes an oversized dining room to enlarge a tiny kitchen in a 1926 English Tudor. She rips out an outdated and tacky mantel to create a stunning fireplace surround, and then creates a large desktop for an in-home office.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Two-deck Tudor
programme.desc: Tamara struggles to create a more spacious master suite until she decides to add a second deck to a 1926 English Tudor. In the backyard, she adds an outdoor living area with a fire pit. She and her dad then realize the garage doors may cause a problem.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Move That Kitchen
programme.desc: Tamara renovates a single-story ranch and tackles her biggest challenge to date, transforming the former master bedroom into a stunning, open kitchen. However, she and her dad run into problems during demolition.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Copper Showstopper
programme.desc: Tamara continues renovations on the ranch by creating a new master suite. While polishing the copper fireplace hood, Tamara and her dad use a familiar solution that has unusual results. Her plans to create a sunroom run into problems due to weather.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Families Helping Families
programme.desc: Mike is going back to his roots and helping families, along with his kids, Michael and Sherry. At a home they dub The City Barn, they plan to fix the weathered roof and make the property more accessible for a 13-year-old who is battling cancer.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Divide and Conquer
programme.desc: Structural issues at their two clients' houses means Mike and Michael must split up and tackle the jobs separately. Michael takes on the roof and other problems at The City Barn, while Mike uncovers unsettling complications.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Not a Dry Eye in the House
programme.desc: The Flood House is close to completion and the showpiece gas fireplace with a custom mantel brings one of the homeowners to tears. Over at The City Barn, more structural issues arise, creating greater challenges than Mike and the team expected.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: No Bones About It
programme.desc: Police are called to investigate after Michael makes a startling discovery at The City Barn. Then, Mike shows The Toxic Townhouse's owners the structural issues and dangerous gas line.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: Mike and the crew start a new home that was left half-finished by a contractor and find tons of problems behind the walls. Michael and designer Kimm go shopping for flooring with some furry friends, and Sherry and Cali take baby steps getting to work.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Raising the Heat
programme.desc: Roger Mooking visits the Lone Star State, where they're taking open-fire cooking to new culinary heights with unique rigs. In Fort Worth, Texas, chef and restaurateur Lou Lambert invites Roger to his ranch to slow-roast whole hogs over oak coals.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Beef and Beyond
programme.desc: Beef is king in Texas, and Roger Mooking visits two pitmasters who are elevating traditional smoked meats with exciting global flavours. In Pearland, Texas, he helps Ronnie Killen season and smoke brisket and beef ribs to serve at Killen's Barbecue.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Grand Rapids, MI
programme.desc: Casey travels to Grand Rapids, Michigan, where he takes on a five-pound tray loaded with chili dogs, French fries, beer-battered onion rings and a 20-ounce soda.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Ozark Mountains
programme.desc: Casey travels over the Ozarks to tackle the Goliath, a massive cupcake equal to 22 regular-sized cupcakes.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Charleston, SC
programme.desc: Casey heads to Charleston, SC, for some epic low country eats. He takes on the belt buster challenge where he must consume a two-pound burger, three pounds of nachos, a hulking order of tater tots and a 12-ounce milkshake in 20 minutes.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Boise, ID
programme.desc: Casey Webb ventures to beautiful Boise, Idaho, for a sushi and soup challenge so diabolically spicy, it goes by the name of Demon's Delight.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Bring the Heat
programme.desc: In Casey's years of facing off against food, he's taken on his fair share of heat. Casey's counting down the hottest, culminating in a challenge so spicy it may crack the Scoville scale and the number.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Santa Fe, New Mexico
programme.desc: Casey Webb's search for the biggest and best in Santa Fe, New Mexico, starts with a sopapilla stuffed with carne asada. Then he takes on some game-changing ice cream flavored with the local delicacy, green chiles.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Charlotte, North Carolina
programme.desc: Casey Webb charges into Charlotte, North Carolina, for three takes on Southern specialties. There's a cheesy chicken classic care of Korea, a time-honored institution's signature sandwich and the biggest walking taco in all the Carolinas.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Decadent Desserts
programme.desc: Casey's sojourn of sustenance has had no shortage of sweets, and now it's time to celebrate the best of the best. We're counting down the most decadent desserts in Man vs. Food history and inducting them into our Hall of Fame.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Wild Smoke and Fiery Burgers
programme.desc: In Palm Springs, Calif., Michael Symon finds a spicy burger that ignites a four-alarm fire, and a chorizo-pineapple burger sings a perfect harmony of sweet and heat.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Stuffed, Spicy and Cheesy
programme.desc: In Queens, N.Y., Michael Symon gets in touch with his Greek heritage with a classic lamb and feta cheeseburger, and then he sinks his teeth into an Italian-style burger stuffed with smoky mozzarella and prosciutto.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Tastes of the Tropics
programme.desc: Pastry chef phenom, Ron Ben-Israel, hangs with Michael Symon in Baton Rouge, La. to feast on a mile-high key lime pie and Caribbean-inspired brisket melt.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Finger-Licking Good
programme.desc: Alex Guarnaschelli joins Michael Symon at one of his favorite Manhattan spots, where they combine a bottomless beer selection with the most high-octane hot dog known to man.

programme.title: The Loud House: Intern for the Worse/ The Old and the Restless
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde both get an internship at Flip's and compete to win the manager title. When Lincoln sees how tame Pop Pop has gotten in his older age, he takes him out for a day to remember.

programme.title: The Loud House: Heavy Meddle/ Making the Case
programme.desc: After being picked on, Lincoln regrets telling his sisters to stay out of his business. When a video contest opens at school, Lincoln decides to record his sisters embarrassing themselves.

programme.title: The Loud House: Linc or Swim/ Changing the Baby
programme.desc: Lincoln purchases a kiddie pool, and things get out of hand when all 10 of his sisters want to use it. After noticing that none of his sisters share his interests, Lincoln attempts to mold Lily into his mini-me.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Gullible Pants/ Overbooked
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs leaves SpongeBob in charge of the Krusty Krab for 15 minutes. SpongeBob triple-books his schedule, and does his best to be at all three events at the same time.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: That Sinking Feeling/ Karate Star
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick dig a tunnel between their two houses and drive Squidward nuts.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Baby Whisperer/ Let's Make a Deal
programme.desc: Alvin dresses Theodore up like a baby in order to impress the girl of his dreams. While attempting to make a special present for Dave, Alvin creates a snowball effect of chaos.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Cat Sitter/ Addicted
programme.desc: Theodore gets stuck taking care of Miss Croner's cats during the week. Dave wants the boys to focus only on school. The Chipettes challenge the Chipmunks to go three hours without their favorite things.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Alvin's Wild Weekend/ For Whom the Bell Tolls
programme.desc: Alvin begs Dave to spend a weekend alone with him. A hypnotist accidentally turns Simon into a bumbling fool before an academic contest.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Let Them Eat Crumbs/ Who Ghosts There
programme.desc: Eleanor has prepared a cake for a Bake-Off. But Brittany and Alvin come home and eat the cake without knowing its importance! Later, worried that Dave will move the family to his dream house, the boys make the house seem haunted.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Something's Fishy/ Presto Chang-O
programme.desc: Timmy is at the beach and he's bored silly. Wanting to go diving, he wishes to become a fish; Timmy hasn't studied for a test in Mr. Crocker's class so he wishes for a device that allows him to change places with anyone who comes in contact with it.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: The Good Ol' Days/ Future Lost
programme.desc: Timmy gets babysat by Dad's dad; Timmy and Dad come upon Dad's favourite childhood book.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Timmy the Barbarian/ No Substitute for Crazy
programme.desc: Jorgen Von Strangle tells the very macho story of muscular warrior Timmy the Barbarian.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Mission Responsible/ Hair-I-Cane
programme.desc: Cosmo and Wanda are exhausted, so Timmy volunteers to baby-sit and give them a night out. Timmy's tired of getting really bad haircuts from Dad.

programme.title: Danger Force: Say My Name
programme.desc: The members of Danger Force are given terrible nicknames live on KLVY news, so they come up with a plan to announce to the world who they really are - Volt, AWOL, ShoutOut, and Brainstorm.

programme.title: Danger Force: Crush
programme.desc: Captain Man and Schwoz have a new group of four young superheroes to train.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: V.I.Peeved/ Señor Class
programme.desc: When her blog is discovered by a famous musician, Carlota fears her family will embarrass her. Then, when Hector decides to finish his schooling, he become Ronnie Anne and Carl's new classmate.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: An Udder Mess/ Teacher's Fret
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne wins two tickets to Dairyland – but has to choose between her besties Sid and Lincoln for the day. / When Ronnie Anne finds out her dad is dating her teacher, she teams with Sid to break them up ASAP.

programme.title: The Loud House: Teacher's Union/ Head Poet's Anxiety
programme.desc: To try and make gym class better, Lincoln and Clyde set Coach Pacowski and Mrs. Johnson up. Luan mentors Lucy teaching her how to manage the ups and downs of pursuing a life in the arts.

programme.title: The Loud House: The Mad Scientist/ Missed Connection
programme.desc: Lisa gets invited to work at an institute and get away from her crazy family. Lori and Bobby worry that dating long-distance is causing them to lose their connection.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Out of Darkness
programme.desc: Hera and Sabine take the Phantom to an abandoned asteroid base for resupply but become stranded there since the boys neglected to properly prepare the shuttle. Ravenous creatures attack while the Ghost crew scrambles to extract them.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Empire Day
programme.desc: On Empire Day, a government-mandated celebration of the founding of the Empire, an old friend of Ezra's parents, Tseebo, seeks help from the crew to escape off world with important Imperial information.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Summerween
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel are excited to join in on the fun, but when Wendy casually mentions that trick-or-treating is for kids, Dipper's whole outlook on the evening changes. Dipper accidentally insults a monster who makes him fill his candy quota or be eaten.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Deep End
programme.desc: When Mabel befriends a cute Merman trapped in the deep end of the public pool, she's determined to return him to his family in the ocean, even though that means her whirlwind romance will come to an end.

programme.title: Amphibia: Contagi-Anne/ Family Shrub
programme.desc: Anne fakes getting sick to get off work, but the rest of the family gets sick. Sprig and Polly think their family history is boring, until they uncover family secrets.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lily Pad Thai/ Plantar's Last Stand
programme.desc: Anne gets a job at Stumpy’s and goes overboard turning the diner into a Thai restaurant. After a rent increase on the food stand, Anne convinces Hop Pop to sell Plantar's Potions.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Shut-In!
programme.desc: In this special extended episode, Anne and the Plantars protect themselves from the dangers of the annual Blue Moon by locking themselves in the house and entertaining each other with the scariest stories they can think of.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Spy Fly
programme.desc: Leo turns to Bree for help after he mistakenly unleashes a swarm of robotic flies on the school. Adam and Chase turn their class assignment into a destructive competition.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Missin' the Mission
programme.desc: Leo finally goes a mission with Davenport and Eddy in an attempt to stop an underground gas leak. Adam, Bree and Chase struggle to escape from Principal Perry's detention lockdown.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Speed Trapped
programme.desc: Adam, Bree and Chase sneak out to meet Marcus in Davenport's new self-driving sports car.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Fish You Were Here
programme.desc: Bailey is upset when she is the only one of her classmates not invited to a birthday party.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Baby Please
programme.desc: Bailey catches Herman reading her diary and decides to get payback by pranking him.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Party Hearty
programme.desc: Chance tries to figure out why he's the only one of his friends invited to party, while the gang pulls off a prank that makes Herman's creepy life-size doll appear to come to life just in time to scare a babysitter.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Welcome to the Neighborhood
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Blessious This Messious
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Amphibia: Civil Wart/ Hop-Popular
programme.desc: Anne exposes Wartwood to a teen romance film, and the town is split on the movie's love triangle. After losing his stand, Hop Pop decides to run for mayor of Wartwood.

programme.title: Amphibia: Croak and Punishment/ Trip to the Archives
programme.desc: When Sprig's Blue Moon Shell is stolen, he and Anne investigate to find the crook. To prepare for Anne's quest, the Plantars go to the archives and accidentally get trapped!

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Bottomless Pit!
programme.desc: When Stan, Dipper, Mabel and Soos find themselves falling into a bottomless pit, they each decide to tell a different story to pass the time.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boyz Crazy
programme.desc: Mabel joins a secret knitting club and is pressured by her new friends to gossip, but when she tells them that Dipper likes Wendy, she inadvertently puts Dipper's life in danger.

programme.title: The Owl House: I Was a Teenage Abomination
programme.desc: Luz sneaks into the local magic school to help a friend and makes a new enemy in the process.

programme.title: The Owl House: The Intruder
programme.desc: Luz and King must defend The Owl House from a mysterious intruder.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Bully Bust/ Backyard Hodge Podge
programme.desc: Candace challenges Buford to keep the boys' invention from disappearing.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Der Kinderlumper/ Just Desserts
programme.desc: Candace is chosen to be Rutabega princess and gets to start the Running of the Chinchillas.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Inconveniencing
programme.desc: When Dipper tries to impress Wendy by acting older than he really is, he's invited to join a group of teenagers on a trek that leads to an old abandoned convenience store that could be haunted.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Hand That Rocks the Mabel
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel discover their seemingly cherubic new neighbour, Lil' Gideon, happens to be the town's adored psychic. But when Dipper convinces Mabel to go on a date with Gideon to question his authenticity, she soon learns that his cuteness can fade.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gridlocked/ Mama Bird
programme.desc: Bill brings the family out to the country for a road trip, but a traffic jam halts their plans. Tilly finds a bird's nest and tries to raise the chicks as her own, but they choose Cricket.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricketsitter/ Backflip Bill
programme.desc: Bill takes Gramma to a doctor’s checkup and leaves Tilly in charge of Cricket. Cricket learns that Bill never realized his childhood dream of becoming a gymnast.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Hiya Henry/ People Watching
programme.desc: Tilly tries ventriloquism for the Big Coffee open mic, but her dummy terrifies Cricket. The family plays the people watching game, making up stories about city folk passing by.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Hurty Tooth / Sleepover Sisters
programme.desc: The Greens go on a family visit to the dentist's office where Cricket is determined to avoid Dr. Enamel and power through his toothache.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne or Beast?/ Best Fronds
programme.desc: Sprig tries to capture a mysterious beast to prove that he's responsible; Sprig takes Anne swimming in a nearby lake to help her feel less homesick.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne Theft Auto / Breakout Star
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: DuckTales: Quack Pack!
programme.desc: The family is not quite themselves as they soon discover the planned family photo shoot might just be a part of a bigger 'wish' gone wrong!

programme.title: DuckTales: Challenge of the Senior Junior Woodchucks!
programme.desc: Huey races against Violet in a challenge to be named Senior Junior Woodchuck. Scrooge and the family search for a secret Woodchuck treasure.

programme.title: DuckTales: Double-O-Duck in You Only Crash Twice!
programme.desc: A spy video game turns dangerously real as Launchpad and Dewey must stop F.O.W.L. agent Steelbeak’s plan to destroy Duckburg.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Lost Harp of Mervana!
programme.desc: The family joins a zen mermaid society to find a missing mystery, but Louie is convinced the seemingly innocent mermaids have a villainous agenda of their own.

programme.title: DuckTales: Louie's Eleven!
programme.desc: Donald and Louie trick Daisy the no-nonsense planner, so the Three Caballeros can play at a high-class party.

programme.title: DuckTales: Astro B.O.Y.D.!
programme.desc: With Boyd on the fritz, Huey, Gyro, and Fenton travel to Japan to the lab where he was created. However, a secret from Boyd’s past could spell doom for Gizmoduck.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Rumble for Ragnarok!
programme.desc: Dewey must embrace his inner heel to beat the beloved Viking wrestling champ Jormungandr in a battle royale for the fate of the Earth.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Phantom and the Sorceress!
programme.desc: When a mysterious magic thief arrives in Duckburg, Lena must confront her past and team with her treacherous aunt, Magica.

programme.title: DuckTales: They Put a Moonlander on the Earth!
programme.desc: Webby sets out to prove to a homesick Penumbra that Earth can be a lot of fun by riding Glomgold's newest gift to Duckburg, the suspicious Flintferris Glomwheel.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Forbidden Fountain of the Foreverglades!
programme.desc: Scrooge and Goldie O'Gilt are turned into teenagers as they race Rockerduck to the Fountain of Youth.

programme.title: DuckTales: Let's Get Dangerous! Part II: The St. Canardian Guardian!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: DuckTales: Let's Get Dangerous! Part II: The St. Canardian Guardian!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: Beyblade: Burst Surge: Dream Team! Tag Battle!
Phineas and Ferb: Boyfriend From 27,000 B.C./ Voyage to the Bottom of Buford

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Empire Day
programme.desc: On Empire Day, a government-mandated celebration of the founding of the Empire, an old friend of Ezra's parents, Tseebo, seeks help from the crew to escape off world with important Imperial information.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Gathering Forces
programme.desc: To draw the Imperials away from Tseebo, Kanan lures the Inquisitor to a planet filled with dangerous creatures. In the heat of battle, Ezra taps into his growing abilities with the Force allowing the Phantom to flee.

programme.title: Real Time With Bill Maher
programme.desc: Nineteen seasons in and counting, comedian Bill Maher has definitely gotten a handle on late-night comedic news. Discussing hot topics across platforms ranging from arts and culture to celebrity news, politics and science, Maher is full of opinions.

programme.title: Pray, Obey, Kill: The Evil God of Knutby
programme.desc: As Anton and Martin search for the source of the anonymous texts, former members recount the sect’s final days.

programme.title: Movie: Life of Pi
programme.desc: A young shipwreck survivor finds himself on the open ocean, stranded in a lifeboat with a Bengal tiger.

programme.title: The Nevers: Undertaking
programme.desc: While Mundi seeks justice, Amalia and her most trusted advisors make a list of potential enemies. Harriet, Primrose, and the other Orphans attempt to decipher a message. Later, Amalia exposes an unexpected threat.

programme.title: Movie: The Dark Knight Rises
programme.desc: Batman makes his return to Gotham when Bane, a new underground terrorist, threatens to take over the city.

programme.title: A Black Lady Sketch Show
programme.desc: A 30-minute sketch comedy series written by and starring Robin Thede.

programme.title: Mare of Easttown: Enter Number Two
programme.desc: Phone records lead Mare and Colin to question an unlikely suspect. Later, Mare receives some unprompted family advice from Richard.

programme.title: Movie: Bad Education
programme.desc: An embezzlement scandal surfaces within a successful Long Island public school district that threatens to destroy what has been built, and one of the men in charge is forced to maintain order and secrecy by whatever means necessary.

programme.title: Movie: Autumn in New York
programme.desc: A 50-year-old womanizing restaurateur decides to change his irresponsible ways when he falls in love with a terminally ill young woman.

programme.title: Movie: The Call of the Wild
programme.desc: A spoiled dog is sold to a dog-sledding operation, and struggles to survive in the Yukon wilderness.

programme.title: We Are the Dream: The Kids of the Oakland MLK Fest
programme.desc: Every year hundreds of children participate in the Oakland MLK Oratorical Festival, a stirring public speaking competition. This film follows students from schools across the city in the months leading up to the 40th annual festival as they rehearse.

programme.title: Movie: Going in Style
programme.desc: Three lifelong friends are caught in a desperate situation when their bank decides to freeze their pension payments after a robbery. With bills to pay and family to support, the three men go on a daring adventure and attempt to rob the bank themselves.

programme.title: Movie: The Scorpion King
programme.desc: In ancient times, a warrior sets out to stop an evil king from taking over the land.

programme.title: Movie: The Fast and the Furious
programme.desc: An undercover police officer infiltrates an L.A. street gang in order to crack a hijacking ring.

programme.title: Movie: Save the Last Dance
programme.desc: A talented dancer gives up ballet and is forced to attend a new school after her mother dies. She falls for a fellow dancer despite the social obstacles they face.

programme.title: Movie: Battleship
programme.desc: The fate of the Earth hangs in the balance as a fleet of naval ships are forced into a battle with an alien armada. Cut off from reinforcements, they must survive on wits and a strategic attack pattern if they are to survive.

programme.title: Movie: The Hurt Locker
programme.desc: A team of bomb technicians with only a few days left on their tour of Iraq, struggle to control their reckless new sergeant. The new leader puts the excitement of urban combat ahead of the safety of his men, forcing them into deadly situations.

programme.title: Movie: The Silence of the Lambs
programme.desc: A serial killer is on the loose. At their wits ends, the FBI enlists new recruit Clarice and the help of a psychotic genius who is behind bars. In order to stop a madman, Clarice must overcome her aversion to her disturbing new partner.

programme.title: Movie: Hannibal
programme.desc: A brutal serial killer resurfaces to play cat and mouse with his FBI Agent nemesis.

programme.title: City on a Hill: Don't Go Sayin Last Words
programme.desc: With Anton on the lam, Kelvin struggles to lead the Braxton Boys and Jackie homes in on Grace. He knows she's hiding something. Sidelined from the investigation, Decourcy finds himself at a disconnect with Siobhan.

programme.title: Couples Therapy
programme.desc: Tashira evades Dru's affection. Michal and Michael announce a life-changing surprise and Orna critiques Michal. Matthew digs into his traumatic childhood.

programme.title: Couples Therapy
programme.desc: Michael investigates his own passivity. Evidence from past traumas haunts Matthew and Gianni. Orna is tempted to cross a line. A family crisis devastates Tashira, but Dru struggles to relate.

programme.title: Cinema Toast: The Cowboy President

programme.title: Very Scary People: Son of Sam: The Duke of Death

programme.title: Very Scary People: Son of Sam: I Am A Monster

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Golden State Killer: Hiding in Plain Sight Part 2

programme.title: Forensic Files: Going for Broke
programme.desc: A Russian immigrant stockbroker is found dead and a strange phone call to his office is the only clue investigators have to go on - until they're led to a client who's made some bad investments, and a dog that sheds a little more than his owner realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Just Desserts
