programme.title: Snapped: Rebecca Smith
programme.desc: When the half-dressed, partially frozen body of a Navy veteran is found lying in a ditch, rumors and lies will challenge detectives' efforts to lay bare the truth behind the chilling death.

programme.title: Snapped: Karina Rafter
programme.desc: While investigating the tragic murder of a devoted father in Virginia, detectives must work their way through several disturbing theories and contentious family dynamics to get to the heart-breaking truth.

programme.title: Snapped: Barbara Cameron
programme.desc: Death hits close to home when a Mississippi father of four is brutally killed on his own front porch. Soon a mother and son turn against one another as detectives work to untangle a murky tale of "he said she said" to close in on a killer.

programme.title: The Piketon Family Murders
programme.desc: In rural Piketon, Ohio a family of 8 is murdered execution style across four different properties. As police investigate the attack, word of the brutal murders sends shockwaves through the community and destroys the lives of two families.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Farm
programme.desc: Bill and Shirley Carter had raised a family on their sprawling farm in America's heartland. As their golden years approached, tragedy struck and the seeds of a mystery pitting one family member against another had been planted.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Missing Marie
programme.desc: Marie Singleton was a single mom who fell hard for Andre Jackson, a single dad raising his two kids. The couple married and seemed happy. Then Marie vanished and investigators discovered secrets. Was her disappearance related to her undercover job?

programme.title: Snapped: Eric Copple
programme.desc: On Halloween night a knife-wielding intruder attacks and kills two roommates and leaves another lucky to be alive. Although the story is reminiscent to the plot of a horror film – for this California town the terror is all too real.

programme.title: Snapped: Letti Strait
programme.desc: Questions about a Kansas City man's ties to the mafia are raised when he is found shot to death in his own home, but a closer inspection reveals a spiteful killer with a more personal connection.

programme.title: Snapped: Linda Culbertson
programme.desc: After a successful attorney is brutally murdered outside of his own office, investigators uncover a maze of obsession and jealousy that leads to a scornful perpetrator.

programme.title: Snapped: Debra Henderson
programme.desc: A shot at love brings an Oklahoma woman to rural Texas, but her quick disappearance has investigators following a paper trail that will expose the treachery of greed.

programme.title: Snapped: Nancy Siegel
programme.desc: After a John Doe is found murdered at a Virginia park, investigators spend seven years unravelling the truth behind a killer with a decade-long history of deception and fraud.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Landing
programme.desc: Heather Elvis was a young woman eager to make her mark on the world. Then she disappeared. Investigators discovered a love triangle and thought they had their motive. But there was a question the Elvis family still needed answered: Where was Heather?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Watcher
programme.desc: Lauren Giddings was smart, charismatic and a newly-minted law school graduate. She had dreams of becoming a public defender, then she was brutally murdered. Her killer tried to pull off the perfect crime, but a secret recording exposed the truth.

programme.title: Snapped: Jerrie Lynn Acklin
programme.desc: The mysterious disappearance of a beloved nurse leads Arkansas investigators down a twisted path of familial betrayal. As detectives hunt for the missing woman, evidence upturned along the way points toward deadly foul play.

programme.title: Snapped: Christine Roush
programme.desc: The body of an unidentified female is found within a forested nature center in Bloomington, Illinois. Investigators must scramble to piece together her fractured life and try to determine just how familiar her killer may be.

programme.title: Snapped: Laurie Bembenek
programme.desc: One woman's innocence is called into question when a mother of two is found deceased in a Milwaukee home. However, the controversial case is far from buttoned up, when years later, new evidence comes to light that changes everything.

programme.title: Snapped: Sandra Jonas
programme.desc: When an Idaho family returns home from a church gathering, they find dinner burned to a crisp, a missing fiancée, and unique signs of a brutal crime. All leads point close to home when detectives begin their investigation.

programme.title: Snapped: Debra Hartman
programme.desc: A 14-year-old girl discovers her wealthy father brutally executed in their home late at night. The investigation proves that not everything is as it seems, discovering love affairs, possible connections to the mob, and a twisted journey to justice.

programme.title: Snapped: Rose Kuehni
programme.desc: A close-knit family starts a search for their brother after he fails to show up at Thanksgiving dinner. As investigators dig deeper they realize his recent online presence may be a charade conducted by a jealous killer.

programme.title: Snapped: Princess LaCaze
programme.desc: When the last real cowboy is found dead at home, detectives dig in and are hard-pressed to find anyone who'd want to see this loving father murdered. But a closer look at his nearest confidants unravels a heinous plot twisted by love and money.

programme.title: Snapped: Donna Trapani
programme.desc: After a beloved town librarian is gunned down, investigators discover that this murder-for-hire gives a whole new meaning to a broken heart.

programme.title: Snapped: Virginia Hyatt

programme.desc: Our galaxy is full of stars ready to explode into supernovas, a stellar detonation powerful enough to destroy all life on Earth; it's an event that hasn't occurred in 400 years, and the search is on to locate which star may be next.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Secrets of the Asteroids
programme.desc: One of NASA's most ambitious missions is investigating an asteroid in more detail than ever before, revealing how space rocks can kick-start life on other planets and how they could possibly hold answers to the secrets of the Solar System.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Bermuda Triangle of Space
programme.desc: Astronauts have detected a mysterious region of space that's dangerous for reasons they have yet to understand, and scientists believe the long-term effects of this danger zone may have implications for the future of humanity both in space and on Earth.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: The Next Supernova
programme.desc: Our galaxy is full of stars ready to explode into supernovas, a stellar detonation powerful enough to destroy all life on Earth; it's an event that hasn't occurred in 400 years, and the search is on to locate which star may be next.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Secrets of the Asteroids
programme.desc: One of NASA's most ambitious missions is investigating an asteroid in more detail than ever before, revealing how space rocks can kick-start life on other planets and how they could possibly hold answers to the secrets of the Solar System.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Bermuda Triangle of Space
programme.desc: Astronauts have detected a mysterious region of space that's dangerous for reasons they have yet to understand, and scientists believe the long-term effects of this danger zone may have implications for the future of humanity both in space and on Earth.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Universe: Our Solar System: Secrets of Saturn
programme.desc: Saturn is the crown jewel of the solar system, and using the latest discoveries, some of the world's top experts seek to unravel the mystery of why its extensive ring system exists and if any of its many moons could harbor alien life.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Hunt for the Ark of the Covenant
programme.desc: New clues taken from long-lost maps offer fresh leads in the hunt for the Ark of the Covenant, and using the latest hi-tech archaeological methods, experts retrace its steps through the Holy Land, Egypt, and Ethiopia to make a game-changing discovery.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Finding the Fountain of Youth
programme.desc: The legend of the Fountain of Youth might finally be explained by hidden messages encoded in a 500-year-old map, and using cutting-edge archaeological methods, experts explore forgotten caves and perilous waters to reveal this mystery's long-lost secrets.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Ghost Ship of the Damned
programme.desc: A long-lost treasure map claims to know the whereabouts of a missing ship buried with gold and silver in the California desert, and using cutting-edge technology, a team of experts use this new evidence to get close to a game-changing discovery.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Mystery of the American Maya
programme.desc: New evidence suggests the Maya civilization did not suddenly vanish, but that they instead still survived, they just resettled in the United States. Using cutting-edge tech, experts reveal what really happened to these long-lost people.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Knights Templar in America
programme.desc: Mysterious new evidence suggests the Knights Templar fled Europe and rebuilt their fearsome warrior order in the Americas a century before Columbus, and experts use cutting-edge tech to investigate if long-lost relics confirm this game-changing theory.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: Rise of the Nightstalkers
programme.desc: A former CIA operative investigates new evidence of a top-secret group known as the 'Nightstalkers,' a clandestine team of the world's best aviators involved in the assassination of Osama Bin Laden and other dangerous black ops.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: How to Stop an Assassination
programme.desc: Newly declassified document reveal the details of a top-secret government program created in the wake of the Kennedy assassination to go to extreme lengths to protect the president. A former CIA operative exposes the cutting-edge defenses now in place.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: Iron Man Army
programme.desc: A former CIA operative investigates newly declassified documents that reveal the secrets of a multibillion-dollar mission to build a real-life Iron Man equipped with superhuman strength, cutting-edge weapons, and telepathic abilities.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: American UFOs
programme.desc: A top-secret aviation program funded by a mysterious money trail could have built a plane that can travel nearly 4,000 miles an hour; a former CIA operative investigates how these superplanes will revolutionize flight and unleash a new lethal technology.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: To Catch an Alien
programme.desc: A top-secret government program might have proof that aliens have visited earth, and a former CIA operative uses newly declassified documents and special access to investigate if the US military already has its hands on advanced, alien technology.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: Secrets of the Space Force
programme.desc: Newly declassified documents reveal that the US Space Force is the culmination of decades of top-secret military programs to weaponize the cosmos, and special access exposes the cutting-edge weapons and sci-fi defense systems behind real-life star wars.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of Genghis Khan
programme.desc: A strange structure is discovered in the Gobi Desert, and experts investigate if this mysterious site could reveal the whereabouts of lost treasure, which might change everything we know about Genghis Khan and the Mongol warriors who once lived here.

programme.title: What on Earth?: CIA Killer Monks
programme.desc: Something strange in the Himalayas could be evidence of a top-secret CIA program to turn monks into killer agents, and cutting-edge science helps experts investigate the truth behind this mysterious anomaly.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Bloodlines
programme.desc: An elderly couple are found murdered in their home. At first it's believed to be a robbery-gone-wrong until detectives realize it may me a family member with a grudge.

programme.title: Murder Calls: The Silencer
programme.desc: With the help of a neighbor, an injured woman calls 911 saying an intruder broke into her boyfriend's home and shot them both. Police respond and find the boyfriend executed. Cops must decipher strange evidence left behind to identify the killer.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: This Guy's Getting Paranoid
programme.desc: Roaa Al-Dhanoon has disappeared. What begins as a missing persons case, takes a disturbing turn by someone who is closest to her. Now, detectives must unravel a complex web of deceit that continues to strike fear throughout the devastated community.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: The Girl in the Crowd
programme.desc: What starts as a calm night at the American Legion in Evansville, Indiana, quickly takes a turn when Anthony Blaylock is shot dead. But when detectives obtain video surveillance showing who is responsible, they stop at nothing to find his killer.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: The Girl in the Park
programme.desc: A deceased female's brutally beaten and sexually assaulted body turns up in Farmington, New Mexico. With an unidentified victim and plenty of suspects, detectives struggle with one of the most challenging 'whodunits' of their career.

programme.title: See No Evil: Meet Me at Midnight
programme.desc: In Calgary, Alberta, 24-year-old Ryan Lane receives a late-night call and heads out to meet the mystery caller. He is never heard from again. Calgary Police Service turns to surveillance video to locate Ryan and finds evidence of a shocking betrayal.

programme.title: See No Evil: Come Quickly, I'm Afraid
programme.desc: In Danville, Kentucky, a pawn store robbery leaves three people dead. Detectives struggle to identify the suspect, their only lead is a mysterious silver van. Using a trail of video to pursue the elusive vehicle is their only hope of catching a killer.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: The Girl in the Park
programme.desc: A deceased female's brutally beaten and sexually assaulted body turns up in Farmington, New Mexico. With an unidentified victim and plenty of suspects, detectives struggle with one of the most challenging 'whodunits' of their career.

programme.title: See No Evil: Meet Me at Midnight
programme.desc: In Calgary, Alberta, 24-year-old Ryan Lane receives a late-night call and heads out to meet the mystery caller. He is never heard from again. Calgary Police Service turns to surveillance video to locate Ryan and finds evidence of a shocking betrayal.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Doctor Will See You
programme.desc: Devoted family man Dr. David Cornbleet is brutally killed in his office. His daughter finds him, bound and gagged, in a pool of blood. Police must rely on CCTV images of man with a concealed face to lead them to David's killer in this twisted tale.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: This Guy's Getting Paranoid
programme.desc: Roaa Al-Dhanoon has disappeared. What begins as a missing persons case, takes a disturbing turn by someone who is closest to her. Now, detectives must unravel a complex web of deceit that continues to strike fear throughout the devastated community.

programme.title: Deadly Sins: Next of Sin
programme.desc: A young woman thinks she's found true love but her ideal man has the heart of a monster. Then a video game junkie is locked in a lonely world until the perfect partner leads him to the darkest place of all.

programme.title: Guilty Rich: Deadly Delusions
programme.desc: Known for his eccentricities and generosity, John Du Pont is used to having it all. But the Olympic wrestling team owner battles private demons... and his money and power stand in the way of an unspeakable tragedy.

programme.title: Murder Loves Company: Nightmare on Bennington Drive
programme.desc: This quaint neighbourhood in Jacksonville, Florida seems to be an unlikely place for any crime at all, let alone murder.

programme.title: Blood Relatives: Deadtime Stories
programme.desc: Police performing a welfare check stumble upon a brutalized body hidden inside an Alabama home's quaint garden shed. The most shocking part? Another family member perished on this property just two days prior.

programme.title: Evil Stepmothers: Deadly Role Play
programme.desc: Anita Smithey appears trapped in an abusive marriage, until Robert Cline comes along. After a fresh start with his family, Anita seems to feel safe. But she soon reveals a dark side to her new step kids. And the prey becomes the ultimate predator.

programme.title: Twisted Love: Love and Hot Lead
programme.desc: Two 18-year-old girls fall head over heels for each other, but when a 49-year-old man decides to come between them, bullets start to fly.

programme.title: Relatively Evil: Masked Motives
programme.desc: After dating a short time, Tyrone Coles asks Denise Gay to move in with him even though family members on both sides oppose this arrangement. A series of tense confrontations leads to a vicious murder and twisted cover up.

programme.title: Killer Bods: Blood, Sweat, and Tears
programme.desc: An ominous mystery grips a small, seaside town when the husband of a competitive bodybuilder abruptly disappears. Puzzling sightings, shocking revelations and bizarre deceptions eventually lead police to a grisly discovery where it's least expected.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Murder of Haley Anderson
programme.desc: When a young nursing student at Binghamton University in New York went missing, her roommates used the app Find My Friends to track her down. What the app led them to launched an international manhunt for her killer.

programme.title: Grave Mysteries: A Secret Life
programme.desc: When 18-year old Brittany Clardy starts dating an older man, her life veers from model student to lost soul. And when the teenager disappears, her family panics. Now, investigators must unravel her complicated life filled with secrets and regret.

programme.title: Shadow of Doubt: Beware the Green-Eyed Monster
programme.desc: Jimmy Sims, a man who owned and operated a boxing gym in the town of Galena Park, Texas, is shot in his driveway. His wife points the finger at the son of his mistress, but police must look at everyone who knew him.

programme.title: The Case That Haunts Me: The House Hermit
programme.desc: The investigation into the deaths of a Toronto couple leads a detective to uncover a pattern of escalating crimes that suggest a serial killer is operating in cottage country.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: A Personal Mission
programme.desc: When a double shooting leaves one woman dead and another clinging to life, John joins police on the trail of fugitive Lenell Kirby. Callahan takes on the mysterious murder of a dear Walsh family friend, Lindsay Harris.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: A Culture of Control
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to change the way German people think and feel by creating a new, Nazi form of art and culture. He takes over the film industry and radio stations, giving the Nazis complete control over every image and message his people receive.

programme.title: Bin Laden: A Terrorist Mastermind
programme.desc: See how Osama Bin Laden's journey unfolds; from his roots as a privileged young Saudi boy to becoming the formidable leader of al-Qaeda, and his lifetime commitment to violent terror against the West, resulting in the horrific 9/11 attacks in 2001.

programme.title: Ace in the Hole
programme.desc: Although the falling of Baghdad took only 21 days, the capture of Saddam Hussein took eight more months. Learn firsthand how the United Sates Army investigators tracked every lead until their final raid uncovered the Iraqi dictator in his spider hole.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Viking Apocalypse
programme.desc: Backed with overwhelming force, Pagan Vikings wrestle King Alfred for control of 9th century England.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Kung Fu Nun
programme.desc: 1644. Ng Mui escapes from Beijing. Taking refuge in a Shaolin monastery, she learns their Kung Fu and develops a new form of the martial art.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Beautiful Samurai
programme.desc: In 12th Century Japan, a female samurai humiliates all the others. As lethal as she was lovely, Tomoe Gozen defeated the finest swordsmen, battled tyranny and was innovative on the battlefield.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: The Pope's Bodyguards
programme.desc: From stone-age Hawaii to 16th-century Japan, from Ancient Greece to the Byzantine Empire, there have always been elite Special Forces.

programme.title: Gunslingers: The Tombstone Vendetta
programme.desc: When one of the frontier's bravest men discovers the limits of the law in the most dangerous boomtown in the West, he exacts his own brand of justice on the cowboys who shot his brothers.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Wild Bill: Marksman and Marked Man
programme.desc: When the most famous man in the Old West outlives his legend, he becomes the target of gunslingers eager to make legends of their own by shooting him dead.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Mussolini: The Father of Fascism
programme.desc: This is the story of the rise and fall of the man who became a role model to Hitler and some of history's worst dictators of the twentieth century and beyond, Benito Mussolini.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Mountain Massacre
programme.desc: The Black Devils, a joint American-Canadian mountain warfare unit, are about to go into action. They must mount a do-or-die night-time assault up a treacherous mountain, in extreme weather, to take on heavily-entrenched battle hardened German defenses.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Adolf Hitler
programme.desc: On June 22, 1941, Adolf Hitler launches the largest military offensive in history against the Soviet Union: Operation Barbarossa. Blinded by his fire power, Hitler signs his death sentence.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Final Victory
programme.desc: The provoking thoughts behind some of the war's most tragic events are shared as the war in the Pacific nears its violent end.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: In 1941, Hitler has thrown himself into a fight to the death against Stalin. Two decades earlier, in 1917, Joseph Jughashvili from Georgia is a member of Lenin's Bolshevik Party, who has just seized power in Russia. The country is torn by civil war.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: A Fresh Start
programme.desc: Mike meets a woman who needs help tackling projects that have accumulated since her husband passed 10 years ago. At The Half Done House, Sherry teaches the apprentices as they frame out the living room's focal point: a show-stopping fireplace.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Wish Come True
programme.desc: The twice done house's troublesome fence, windows and caulking are done right for the first time, and Michael brings the homeowner over to show her the progress. Meanwhile, the half done house becomes the fully done house and the family is welcomed home.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Holmes Is Where the Heart Is
programme.desc: Work continues on the twice done house as the crew finishes the flooring and the kitchen is installed. Mike must take care of a health issue, leaving Sherry and Michael to put the finishing touches on the renovation.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: A Case of Shingles
programme.desc: Mike Holmes and his team get on top of a bad roof that has plagued a family for 40 years. The damage Mike uncovers proves they have been coping with leaks for nearly half a century.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled
programme.desc: Watch episodes of the show with bonus content.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Broken Record
programme.desc: Mike and his team come to the rescue of Sheila and Val, a couple scammed out of their money, their kitchen and their trust by a notorious contracting criminal who would occasionally do one good job to lure other unsuspecting clients.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Below Board
programme.desc: Mike Holmes discovers that a house that looks good on the outside is hiding a rotting secret just below the surface, and now it’s a problem that threatens an entire neighbourhood.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Trenton Central High School
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs team takes on a huge high school in Trenton, NJ. Key items found include fireclay sinks and oak cabinets. Mike and Tay build an N-shaped desk in the shop.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Log Home Gets a Two-Story Cliffside Deck
programme.desc: Mark loves his cliffside log home in the Rocky Mountains, but the small existing deck doesn't take advantage of the million-dollar view.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Family Fun Deck With Plenty of Features
programme.desc: A 1970s-era sunroom and a small deck are taken down to create one space where a family can cook, eat, entertain, and stay warm. The finished project features a two-sided fireplace, water features, and custom privacy.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Shady Space With a View
programme.desc: The biggest demo in Mega Decks history gets underway by tearing down 1500 square feet of stucco. Then steel framing and beams go up to support three different roof styles. Replacing the stucco with rails and a staircase opens up the views for the family.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Building Bigger In Texas
programme.desc: Garth travels to the Lone Star State to build its first mega deck. Garth unifies a disjointed patio, doubling the floor space and quadrupling the covered living area. The $325,000 deck is finished with fire pits, a swim spa and a mesquite bar top.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Blockbuster BBQ Deck Overlooking a Golf Course
programme.desc: Ed and Becky live next to a golf course. Their old deck is weathered and crumbling, and can only be used a few months a year. They challenge the Mega Crew to build a $200,000 deck that will serve as the ultimate spot to barbecue and relax.

programme.title: Mega Decks: In Garth We Trust
programme.desc: A half-finished deck means a call for Garth to deliver the deck of one couples dreams. But to make their dream work, he needs to cut down a few trees, which the owners are unsure of.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Mountain Retreat with a Rocky View
programme.desc: The team contends with nearly impassable roads, mountain weather and a build site on top a granite boulder.

programme.title: Mega Decks: An Ideal Family Deck With a Wood-Burning Fireplace
programme.desc: Randy and Kim want a place for their kids to hang out with their friends, as well as a place to connect and bond as a family, so they've decided to turn their old patio into a family party deck.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Spacious Retreat With Artistic Details
programme.desc: The Mega team overhauls an ugly, exposed and downright dangerous deck disaster. They face challenging weather, rotting wood and even an infestation while transforming two separate and unusable spaces into a sprawling, year-round retreat.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Four-Season Party Deck for a Large Family
programme.desc: John and Bonnie have a very large family and a very small deck. And with their six adult children living nearby, they really want a place for the family to gather. So, they've decided to turn their old deck into the ultimate party deck.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Lazy River Runs Through It
programme.desc: Lucas and crew build their first lazy river! This private lazy river circumnavigates a real island, massive waterfalls and a giant grotto. Lucas kicks it up several notches with a state of the art audio/ video system, outdoor kitchen and special surprise!

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Swimming With the Fishes
programme.desc: The Lucas Lagoons crew creates a backyard oasis in Siesta Key. They take an old, outdated pool and transform it into a natural lagoon.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Paradise on the Bay
programme.desc: A couple from Snead Island, Florida asks the Lucas Lagoons crew to create a bayside paradise. This outdoor living space, pool, spa, fire feature and kitchen will be built without any of Lucas' signature rock work.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: For the Birds
programme.desc: A multi-generational, environmentally conscious family living in a designated bird sanctuary in Osprey, FL asks design expert Lucas Congdon to create both a human pool paradise and a bird pond oasis, all in one outdated, rundown backyard.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Top of the Mountain
programme.desc: Lucas heads west to Bountiful, UT to build a dream backyard on the side of a mountain. Faced with many challenges, Lucas creates a Tuscan themed pool complete with a spa, the biggest linear fire wall he's ever built and a grotto with a 23,000 pound lid.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Bacon Knows Best
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, Nev., Michael Symon takes down a towering fortress of succulent ribs and a sandwich that's a meaty trifecta of juicy brisket, pork and sausage.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Champion Burger Knockouts
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in San Diego with a Champ Burger loaded with beer-braised pork that packs a powerful punch, and he can't pass up a cookie-brownie mashup that satisfies every sweet tooth.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Rowdy with a Chance of Meatballs
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits the Arkansas State Fair in Little Rock to discover a few brand-new favourites. In addition to the eponymous Arkanstick and rolled ice-cream treat known as the Rainbow Roll there are also deep-fried Pina Coladas.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Fryin' King
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the Big Fresno Fair in California for the debut of some new fair foods, including the Flamin' Hot Chimichanga and Rainbow Shrimp Fries.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Latin Fiesta
programme.desc: Noah Cappe travels coast to coast sampling the best carnival creations inspired by the cuisine of Latin America. This fiesta of food features both classic and crazy carnival treats, from Tex-Mex to traditional.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Pepper Popper Party
programme.desc: Noah Cappe challenges carnival concessionaires across America to feature everyone's favorite spicy bar snack in their offerings. From hot dogs and burgers to pizza and onion rings, even a dessert, these pepper popper creations are on fire.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Seoul Dip Sisters
programme.desc: Noah Cappe gets festive at the California Mid-Winter Fair and Fiesta! He's sampling the Seoul Dip- a Korean twist on the French Dip- then keeps things spicy with the Diablo Dog before going for a sweet finish with the Supreme Samoa doughnut stack.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Chowchilla-Madera to Ciao!
programme.desc: In the tiny town of Chowchilla, CA Noah Cappe discovers some carnival eats that deserve to be shared with the world. First up, it's the Deep Pit Barbeque, a meat extravaganza that takes three days to prepare.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Home Cooking
programme.desc: Roger scours the U.S. for all of the best treats from childhood, including home-cooked treats and decadent desserts.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Hey Butter Butter
programme.desc: Seafood dishes like hot lobster rolls and blue crab spaghetti get dressed in robes of butter at restaurants in Boston and New York while bakeries bring butter to new heights in their flaky pastries.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Monster Mashups
programme.desc: We're going eight rounds with the craziest mashups in America! Starting with a heavyweight beast known as the Pizzarito in New York and a delicious German restaurant placed right in the middle of Los Angeles' Koreatown.

programme.title: Late Nite Eats: North Jersey
programme.desc: Jordan Andino kicks off his night in northern New Jersey with coconut crab buns at Dullboy in Jersey City. For his next stop, he's headed just a few blocks away to Talde for Filipino-style short ribs.

programme.title: Late Nite Eats: Toronto
programme.desc: Jordan Andino is exploring the culinary delights of Toronto, Canada's most diverse city.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Smoked
programme.desc: Roger Mooking criss-crosses America to count down 15 of the very best steaks, wings, Reubens and more- all made even better with glorious smoke. From salt-cured country ham to smoked fish chowder, bacon bourbon rib-eye steak to smoky s'mores pancakes.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Saucy
programme.desc: Roger Mooking scours the U.S. to find 15 of the best dishes that are all about the sauce. There's sticky toffee pudding, super spicy wings, a fondue burger, drunken scallops and even chocolate plus barbecue.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Carolina 'Cue
programme.desc: Roger heads to North and South Carolina to visit a few restaurants to have upheld the long tradition of barbecuing. At Sweatman's in Holly Hill, whole hogs are cooked and chopped into perfection.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Outrageous Ovens
programme.desc: Mark Skudlarek fires his kiln to bake pottery and uses some of the coals for cooking.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Smoke and Steam
programme.desc: Roger is invited to two community gatherings abundant with local foods on the Hawaiian Island of Oahu.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: BBQ Sandwiches
programme.desc: Roger heads to the Barbecue Exchange for two delicious sandwiches - one is called heaven and the other is called hell. They're both packed with pulled pork and bacon. Then it's off to KayJoe's BBQ in Centreville, Tennessee.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Insane Inventions
programme.desc: Roger Mooking says goodbye to the standard grill and celebrates the most elaborate, over-the-top smokers and roasters.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Southern Sizzle and Smoke
programme.desc: At a non-profit organization to support veterans in Georgia, Roger Mooking helps cook a whole mutton and slow-roast veggies for a cookout. At Bob Sykes Bar-B-Q in Bessemer, AL, he loads 250 pounds of salted pork into a 15-foot pit.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: K-Days/ North Dakota State Fair

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Jurassic Pork

programme.title: Reba: A Midsemester Night's Dream

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Stan's Return

programme.title: Military Makeover: Operation Career
programme.desc: We're exploring leading companies who are changing the careers and lives of military veterans across the country.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Love the One You're With
programme.desc: The survivors from the crash are asked to make an almost impossible decision that will affect the rest of their lives. Meanwhile, tension grows between Jackson and April after they're forced to work together.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: I Saw Her Standing There
programme.desc: Aware that Derek might never operate again, Meredith stops talking about the surgeries she's performing. Meanwhile, Richard calls on Dr. Catherine Avery to help him perform a complicated procedure, as things continue to heat up between Jackson and April.

programme.title: The Closer: Dead Man's Hand
programme.desc: Captain Raydor approaches Major Crime about looking into a possible case of spousal abuse involving one of her female officers. Brenda and Raydor discover there is more to the story when another officer kills the abused woman's husband.

programme.title: The Closer: The Big Bang
programme.desc: The shooting death of a man taking pictures of the stars from his balcony leads the squad to look closely at the husband of the woman with whom the victim was having an affair. The investigation is hindered by a missing murder weapon.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Year-End Blowout
programme.desc: A year-end-blowout sale becomes literal for a used car lot after one of its owners is killed when a bomb explodes. While the squad tries to find who is responsible, Rusty attempts to catch the person threatening his and Sharon's life.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Return to Sender
programme.desc: The squad must work quickly to track down a serial killer before he strikes again. Meanwhile, things get dangerous over a game of chess.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Return to Sender
programme.desc: The unit draws closer to finding a dangerous serial killer. Rusty faces his biggest challenge yet when he takes the stand against Phillip Stroh. Meanwhile the team goes head to head with a touch attorney.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Flight Risk
programme.desc: When a father and his two young children go missing, the squad has to work quickly to find them, while uncovering a slew of terrible family secrets along the way. Meanwhile, Raydor does her best to trust Rusty.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Personal Day
programme.desc: Shorty after being released from prison, a man who proclaimed his innocence is found murdered. The victim's case is reopened and the squad works hard to solve a 17-year old murder. Meanwhile, Rusty confesses the reason behind his suspicious activity.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: The Lost Boy
programme.desc: A former trouble-maker sits on Ohio death row for killing an elderly couple, while a desperate team of journalists, attorneys, and former law enforcement make the case of his innocence.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Tale of the Tape
programme.desc: After a Delaware store clerk is murdered, a local drug dealer confesses to the crime, but there is doubt that what he said on tape can be believed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dark Waters
programme.desc: Investigators face the daunting task of searching for one boat among many others after a hit-and-run boating accident caused the death of a young man. Detectives hope witnesses to the accident can help them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nice Threads
programme.desc: A woman was found dead on the bedroom floor of her apartment. The crime scene yielded little of value, and investigators wondered if they would find enough evidence to make a case, much less catch a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Office Visit
programme.desc: "The Dr. Brian Stidham Case" A prominent Arizona surgeon is found stabbed to death outside his office. All signs point to a random attack until investigators uncover an unlikely suspect with deep pockets, and an even deeper hatred for the good doctor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoe-In for Murder
programme.desc: A 12 year-old is the only witness to her mother's death and is unable to provide many details. Over a decade later, forensic evidence has lead the investigation right back to where it started.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Interrupted
programme.desc: A family interrupts a burglary in their upscale suburban home. The masked gunman kills two and wounds two more. Police suspect the crime is related to a string of thefts in the area, but a closer look at the crime scene reveals the real motive and killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Saturday
programme.desc: 'The Brian and Beverly Mauck Case - an attractive young couple is found dead in their Graham, Washington home and all signs point to a professional hit. But dogged investigators discover some valuable evidence that proves otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Runaway Love
programme.desc: A woman is found floating in the harbor of an upscale yacht club, stabbed more than 50 times, and her ex-husband and daughter are missing. Investigators turn to forensic science to determine if they’re searching for victims... or perpetrators.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Watchful Eye
programme.desc: 'The Carrie Nelson Case' - The brutal murder of a State Park employee rattles tourists and fellow employees alike. Murdered for just $2,000, police sift through several hundred leads to find a killer so merciless.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Waste Mis-Management
programme.desc: A middle-aged woman vanishes from her apartment complex. When the police find few leads at the scene of the crime, they realize a nearby dumpster may hold the key to all the answers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Little Seacret
programme.desc: A couple spent Memorial Day weekend at the beach, and then they simply vanished. A week later, police would get an unexpected lead from a robbery in progress, and the evidence they found helped solve a crime of unparalleled violence and brutality.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Concrete Alibi
programme.desc: An aspiring model turns up dead and the suspect is obvious. But when things don't turn out quite the way police planned, they have to dig a little deeper. Leaving no stone unturned, a forensic geologist points police to some unlikely suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Key Evidence
programme.desc: An Illinois community is outraged when an off-duty police officer is shot and killed. Police are able to key in on a suspect and with the help of a gunshot residue expert and trace evidence expert make sure their killer pays for his crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Danger
programme.desc: A young man dies in a mysterious car crash, but was it an accident? Forensic science uncovered what really caused the crash, and the truth devastated three different families.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Internal Affair
programme.desc: Friends and family of a woman gone missing were determined to find her until their worst fears were confirmed weeks later. Blood evidence and computer forensics helped investigators to catch the killer, and convince the jury of his guilt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Case of the Flue
programme.desc: In 1993, when an 83 year old woman was found dead in her home, investigators used clues like flecks of paint, t-shirt fibres, and a cellular phone to work out just how, and why, she died.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Safe Place
programme.desc: A wealthy man is gunned down outside his Louisiana home. His wife tells a tale of three masked men emerging from the shadows, but she may know more than she's saying.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Innocence
programme.desc: When a prominent criminal defence attorney is found murdered in his own home, police suspect it may have come at the hands of one of his questionable clientele.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All 'Butt' Certain
programme.desc: A woman is convinced her husband is innocent of murder and conducted her own investigation to prove it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: About Face
programme.desc: A skeleton is found on an abandoned plot of land, but before investigators can figure out who killed her, they have to figure out who she is.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In the Bag
programme.desc: A little boy is found alone and in a panic. When police go to his home, they find his grandparents dead in their bedroom.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Transaction Failed
programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone, or if she was the victim of foul play. Investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to find the answers they needed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Day the Music Died
programme.desc: When grunge singer Mia Zapata was gruesomely murdered, police were at a loss to track down her killer. But thanks to evidence collected by a forethoughtful medical examiner, police were able to catch the killer more than a decade after the fact.

programme.desc: Andy Cohen and stars of 'America's Next Top Model', 'American Idol', and 'The Apprentice' reveal secrets of reality competition shows. Plus an inspiring discussion of 'Black Girl Magic and Reality TV' with Vivica A. Fox and Kandi Burruss.

programme.title: Botched: Not OK From the UK
programme.desc: A UK patient with a duck butt and bulging belly forces Dr. Dubrow to perform a two-stage revision to restore her 24-year-old body. Meanwhile, another Brit needs Dr. Nassif's help to complete his K-Pop transformation.

programme.title: Botched: Bums, Boobs, and Baklava
programme.desc: A British bum ambassador is packing on the pounds to get a Kim K inspired butt while Dr. Dubrow helps a mother of nine battle one of the worst cases of capsular contracture he's ever seen.

programme.title: Botched: Big Booty Problems
programme.desc: Dr. Dubrow lifts a woman's spirit and her udderly disastrous sagging breasts while Dr. Nassif does a rhinoplasty on a woman who has beef with her 'pig nose'. Meanwhile, a viral sensation is desperate for help with her 'big booty problems'.

programme.title: Botched: Flipped Out Butt and a Pelican Neck
programme.desc: Dr. Dubrow helps a patient who is flippin' out over her flippin' butt implants, while Dr. Nassif tries to save a patient with a wrecked pelican neck. Meanwhile, a wannabe trophy wife seeks a bigger booty to find the man of her dreams.

programme.title: Botched: Boob Greed and Bump Its
programme.desc: A woman with four implants in her chest seeks Dr. Dubrow's help to remove them while a transgender patient from Australia wants to add two implants on top of her head to replace her Bump It.

programme.title: Botched: Face Misfor-CHIN
programme.desc: A facial skin graft growing pubic hair challenges Dr. Nassif, while Dr. Dubrow boogies with a boob dancing patient who's back for surgery, and meanwhile, the doctors try and help an ordinary man become Super Man.

programme.title: Overserved with Lisa Vanderpump: Ladies Who Brunch: Anna Camp and Lala Kent
programme.desc: Lisa hosts a decadent weekend brunch for her busy friends — a very candid Anna Camp and a very pregnant Lala Kent — and we’ll learn why you don’t want to cross any of these ladies.

programme.title: Overserved with Lisa Vanderpump: Very Vanderpump: Jim Jefferies and James Kennedy
programme.desc: Lisa rolls out the best of signature Vanderpump style, decor, and food for a reformed James Kennedy and the outrageous Jim Jefferies. It’s all about the (lobster) pasta!

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Your go-to for behind-the-scenes scoop, celebrity guests and entertainment conversation.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Escape From New York

programme.title: Sex and the City: Sex and Another City
programme.desc: While in Los Angeles, the girls head to the Playboy Mansion for a pool party.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Hot Child in the City
programme.desc: Charlotte tackles Trey's problem, while Samantha throws a party for a mature 13-year-old.

programme.title: Movie: Bride Wars
programme.desc: Two long-time best girlfriends are getting married. They wind up scheduling their weddings on the same day and their plans turn into a competition with each other. The friendship becomes a bitter rivalry over their dream weddings.

programme.title: Movie: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: A magazine columnist has a very unusual assignment and a quick deadline. She has to write a firsthand account of all the things women do to inadvertently drive men away and she's got to do it in 10 days. Now she's on a mission to find the right guy.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Strike While the Iron's Hot
programme.desc: For chefs Amanda Freitag and Geoffrey Zakarian, there's no doubt who should win and it's not Bobby. It will be need to be decided between chef Tim Freeman and the Boston native Nookie Postal to see who will go against the Iron Chef.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Just Act Natural
programme.desc: It will be a hardcore competition between veteran Indian chef Thomas John when he takes on personal chef Gail Arnold. Chef Bobby Flay has two excellent friends in the front row to watch, The Barefoot Contessa, Ina Garten, and Neil Patrick Harris.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Bobby vs. Food
programme.desc: "Food Network Star" winner Eddie Jackson brings in the ultimate battle buddy, "Man vs. Food's" Casey Webb, to throw all the manpower they can at Bobby Flay. Fine dining expert Eric Bolyard and seafood aficionado Sarah Wade duke it out for a shot at Bobby.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: By Land or By Sea
programme.desc: Brooke Burke-Charvet and Alton Brown attempt to dethrone Bobby Flay. Chef Jeremy Hanlon bring his beach flair against Chef Alex Diaz.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: The Queen Is In
programme.desc: The queen of food, Martha Stewart, graces the kitchen along with her pal, chef Richard Blais. They hold court with talented chefs Katherine Fuchs and Michael Merida to make Bobby Flay look like the court jester.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: It's All Gouda
programme.desc: Emotions run high as Anne Burrell and Michael Voltaggio bring in two young chefs to challenge Bobby Flay. The two up-and-comers, Dafna Mizrahi and Jose DeJesus, specialize in Mexican cuisine, and they're not going to play nice.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: That's a Lotta Ciabatta
programme.desc: Chef Scott Conant and TV host Katie Brown bring in two masters of Italian pastamaking to see if Bobby Flay's skills can stand up to the test. Chefs Kerri Rogers and Joel Gargano want to make Bobby say addio with their buon cibo.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Too Biggs To Fail
programme.desc: Katie Lee and Jason Biggs put one in Bobby Flay's loss column. Their fingers are crossed that either Colombian restaurateur Sam Gorenstein or Mexican chef David Vargas can bring the heat necessary.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Taking Ownership in Vegas
programme.desc: Julissa, the widowed owner of the Polaris Street Cafe in Las Vegas, is struggling to save her deceased husband's dream restaurant. If Robert Irvine can't get her to find her own path, that dream will die, and so will the business.

programme.title: Chef Boot Camp: Show Me the Intensity
programme.desc: Chef Cliff Crooks mentors a 23-year-old head chef with too much attitude at her family's restaurant, an owner in Brooklyn, MD, who needs to be more assertive and a former hotel owner in Kempton, PA, who sold the business but stayed on to run the kitchen.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: BBF vs. Chopped

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Filthy Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina have seen some nasty houses during their years of flipping, but this house in Garden Grove, California, might take the cake. As they attempt to update the old home, they encounter new problems that make them question their choices.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Busy Flip
programme.desc: When a good deal pops up, Tarek and Christina check out a home in La Mirada, California. What looks to be a quick flip soon turns out to be more difficult, however.

programme.title: House Hunters: Searching for a Chicago Condo
programme.desc: Chicago buyers Kevin and Kevin are having a hard time finding a condo they can agree on. With this former long-distance relationship coming together in the Windy City, it seems the only thing they have in common is their name.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Against the Grain in New Zealand
programme.desc: A British carpenter realizes his childhood dream and moves with his girlfriend to New Zealand. They're looking for a place that's centrally located with three bedrooms, and he wants a home with lots of character, but she prefers something more modern.

programme.title: House Hunters: To Buy or Rent in Fort Lauderdale
programme.desc: A Chicago couple struggles to commit to buying a home after a recent move to Fort Lauderdale, Florida. She's looking for a single family house with a yard for their dogs, but he's only interested in something that's low maintenance at a good price.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Granada, Where the Heart Is
programme.desc: A family relocates to Granada, Spain, so their children can experience more of their Islamic heritage. They need at least three bedrooms and he needs an office space, but she wants a location and views that may be out of their price range.

programme.title: No Demo Reno: Family Memories
programme.desc: A couple asks Jenn to revitalize their outdated family home which contains, among other challenges, the most unusual bathroom she's ever seen. Next, Jenn works with a family whose home has lots of space but no personality to give it the style it deserves.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Toxic Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a small house that's aggressively priced and could be a lucrative deal based on comparable sales in the neighbourhood. They go to inspect the house before making a decision and find it boarded up and in rough shape.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Thrifty vs. Glitzy
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina are contacted by friend and investor, Pete de Best. Pete has found a newer construction home in Orange, California that needs cosmetic updating and should prove to be a fast, simple flip.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: The Money Pit
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina find a listing in Norwalk, California with such an attractive opportunity for profit based on comparable properties that they immediately make an offer on the property, sight unseen.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Junk Yard Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina spot an interesting property in Long Beach, California as they peruse the day's listings. It's a very small house with a massive structure in the backyard.

programme.title: House Hunters: South Carolina Beach Dreams
programme.desc: She wants a home that's move-in ready with plenty of room for guests, but he prefers a smaller, fixer-upper that's more under budget.

programme.title: House Hunters: Security Concerns in Greater D.C.
programme.desc: Newlyweds disagree on style as they search for their first home near Washington, DC. He wants a huge, impressive home like the ones he dreamed of as a boy in India, but she wants something more lived-in and cozy that won't trigger her many phobias.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Texas-Sized Commitment in Brisbane
programme.desc: A Texas woman is moving to settle down with her Aussie partner in Brisbane, Australia. She's looking for a large home with at least four bedrooms and plenty of room for visiting guests, but he prefers something much smaller that's low maintenance.

programme.title: House Hunters: Happy Campers in Montana
programme.desc: After travelling the country in a trailer for more than two years, a couple is ready to put down roots and look for a condo in Bozeman, Montana. He's looking for a small, one-bedroom unit to save money, but she prefers to spend more to get a bigger place.

programme.title: House Hunters: Family vs. Finance in Colorado
programme.desc: A couple needs a bigger house for their growing family in Aurora, Colorado. They're looking for a place with a least four bedrooms with room for visiting family, and while he's interesting in a property they can easily flip, she prefers a long-term home.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Family Dream in Cahors, France
programme.desc: A couple gives up their demanding tech jobs in Silicon Valley to focus on family in Cahors, France. They plan to start a vacation rental business and want a large place with traditional French character, but his big requirements may be too ambitious.

programme.title: House Hunters: Time to Grow Up in Columbus
programme.desc: A couple looks to leave Chicago behind and purchase their first home in Columbus, Ohio. He wants to keep the hustle and bustle of the city with a high-rise downtown, but she's ready to start adulthood with a single family home in the suburbs.

programme.title: House Hunters: Wow Factor in Dallas
programme.desc: A former pro football player and his wife search for a house with 'wow' factor in Dallas. For him, that means a place with ultra-contemporary style, like he saw in movies growing up, but for her it means a chateau-style home, which creeps him out.

programme.title: Bargain Block: Calm Minds and Dark Moods
programme.desc: Evan and Keith hit some road blocks on a house with hidden plumbing issues and another home with a fallen tree on its roof. Keith's mind spins in all directions as he transforms these problem properties into a peaceful haven and a boldly dark masterpiece.

programme.title: Bargain Block: White Box and Cottage
programme.desc: Not everything goes to plan when Keith Bynum and Evan Thomas think they've caught a break with their next homes. Keith attempts an offbeat design with his all-wood White Box house, and Shea helps sell a cozy cottage that's out of their comp zone.

programme.title: Bargain Block: Dormer and Palm
programme.desc: With one house collapsing and the other a broken shell, Evan Thomas and Keith Bynum have their renovation powers put to the test. The Dormer House classes up the block with gold, glamor and glitz, while the Palm House blossoms into an island getaway.

programme.title: Bargain Block: Desert Modern and Mid-Century Museum
programme.desc: A very tight budget threatens to limit the creative genius of Keith and Evan as they tackle their first home renovations on a new block. Old, chipped paint inspires them to design a desert-modern home and turn a '70s camper into a colourful art gallery.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home: A Fresh Start
programme.desc: A veteran, cancer survivor and mother of two looking for a fresh start purchased a home with warm, positive energy, but it is far from perfect. Drew and Jonathan help overhaul the space to transform the house into the balanced sanctuary of her dreams.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home: Raise the Kids, Ignore the House
programme.desc: A couple has put their all into raising their two teen boys, but they have neglected to give their aging house the love it needed. Drew and Jonathan step in and overhaul the tired living room, kitchen and dining room.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home: Move-in Ready
programme.desc: After trying for years, Jackie and JR have two beautiful girls and are now searching for a home to raise them in. They have settled on a spacious suburban house with an amazing backyard but it will need a complete overhaul to make it work.

programme.title: Movie: Murder in the Suburbs
programme.desc: While on vacation, a young family become the focus of a grieving mother and the mystery surrounding her family's tragic death.

programme.title: Movie: Deadly Matrimony

programme.title: Movie: A House on Fire
programme.desc: A brilliant doctor and mother had the epitome of a picture-perfect life, until it took a terrible turn that left her family and marriage in ruin.

programme.title: Movie: A Murder to Remember
programme.desc: A couple celebrate their one-year anniversary with a camping trip, but when he dies suddenly she finds herself alone in the wilderness so she accepts help from another camper. Who might not be who he seems.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Aliens and the Temples of Gold

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Power of Three

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Aliens and the Red Planet
programme.desc: Throughout human history, the planet Mars has captured our imagination. For nearly 40 years, probes have been sending information about Mars back to scientists here on Earth. The human fascination with the red planet is investigated.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Alien Wars
programme.desc: In 2002 Gary McKinnon was arrested for hacking into Pentagon and NASA computers. He claims to have found evidence of a secret American space fleet and their 'non-terrestrial officers.' We investigate possible alien races at war with each other.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Mystery of the Skinwalker Ranch
programme.desc: Within a remote valley in Utah lies a ranch speculated to be a hotbed of inexplicable phenomena. This strange activity could potentially be connected to an alien entity known as the Skinwalker.

programme.title: The Secret of Skinwalker Ranch: Breaking Ground

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Mysterious Nine
programme.desc: Stories of emperors, kings and pharaohs consulting a pantheon of nine gods can be found in virtually every culture across the globe. Sessions conducted by CIA scientists connected with a group of entities called 'The Nine' who influence events on earth.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Forged by the Gods
programme.desc: Ancient astronaut theorists discover more compelling clues to early visitations to earth by extraterrestrials. Astronomers are also learning of an increasing number of planets within the galaxy that could sustain life.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Alien Frequency
programme.desc: The use of mantras and chanting to connect with a higher plane has existed in cultures all over the world dating back thousands of years. We explore if there are certain frequencies that connect us with higher, perhaps extraterrestrial, forces.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Watcher
programme.desc: Lauren Giddings was smart, charismatic and a newly-minted law school graduate. She had dreams of becoming a public defender, then she was brutally murdered. Her killer tried to pull off the perfect crime, but a secret recording exposed the truth.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: A top doctor known for saving lives found himself fighting for his own after he was poisoned. Investigators immediately started looking into the women in his life, wondering if one relationship was toxic.

programme.desc: Susie Casey was an outgoing mother of four going through a divorce. She was twenty steps from her front door when she vanished. Police were investigating three men in her life. They were all there the morning of her murder.

programme.title: Killer Motive: Motorcycles, Murder and Mystery/ A Healthy Dose of Murder
programme.desc: An outspoken radio personality and veterans' advocate is gunned down in her own bedroom. Did her strong opinions make her a target, or did a litany of family secrets lead to her murder.

programme.title: Snapped: Pamela Lanier
programme.desc: A woman's innocence is called into question after her husband dies from a mysterious malady and encourages detectives to take a deep dive into her past.

programme.title: Snapped: Georgia Watson
programme.desc: When a man is ambushed by a firestorm of bullets outside his home, investigators follow a twisted trail of suspects to a vindictive mastermind.

programme.title: Snapped: Carol Carlson
programme.desc: When a Kapowsin, Washington mother is discovered murdered on her couch in a compromised position, investigators must piece together all the evidence to determine if this was a random crime of opportunity or a façade to humiliate the victim.

programme.title: Snapped: Minnie Salinas
programme.desc: Police race for answers after an adored school teacher is found dead in her San Antonio apartment. A string of lies and betrayal comes to light, but when the case goes cold, one detective refuses to give up.

programme.title: Snapped: Debra Banister
programme.desc: When two sisters' husbands turn up dead within weeks of each other, Florida detectives investigate whether the cases are a tragic coincidence or if they're related by something other than blood.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Silent Witness
programme.desc: Michelle Young was married to her college sweetheart and pregnant with their second child when she was murdered. In the search for her killer, detectives uncovered a marriage riddled with secrets but cracking this complicated case took years.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets in the Mist
programme.desc: A young mom, married to her high school sweetheart, vanishes. Did she leave her family to start a new life or was there another reason for her disappearance? Decades later her grown son faced a dark truth at the core of this mystery.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Gateway to Eden
programme.desc: A buried monument offers new evidence about one of the Bible's greatest mysteries. A giant ominous shadow engulfs the Pacific Ocean. Scientists have trouble explaining a strange lake that's shaped like a perfect circle, and is home to otherworldly life.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Ghost Town Terror
programme.desc: When satellites discover a strange abandoned city frozen in time, experts investigate what caused the people who lived here to disappear overnight. Using cutting-edge tech, they follow fresh leads to uncover if this mysterious city has a dark secret.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Treasures of Monster Graveyard
programme.desc: At a mysterious site in the Gobi Desert, experts have discovered a monster graveyard, and this groundbreaking find contains the treasures of the alien beasts that once lived in this strange world.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Treasures of Valhalla
programme.desc: When experts investigate an ancient network of tunnels rumored to be the hiding place of lost royal treasure, they find evidence of human sacrifice for the Viking god Odin. An abandoned fortress in Siberia might shed new light on Genghis Khan.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien in Paradise
programme.desc: A bizarre, tentacled black mass emerges from the seas on an island in the Caribbean, and on-lookers are horrified as it writhes ashore; experts use cutting-edge tech to investigate the origin of this alien invader.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Stalin's Secret Atlantis
programme.desc: When experts spot what appears to be an abandoned city in the Caspian Sea, they investigate declassified Cold War evidence to reveal an Atlantis-like city built by the Soviets; what they find exposes its long-lost secrets.

programme.title: What on Earth?: America's Swamp Castle
programme.desc: Satellite images capture bizarre structures in the remote and inhospitable swamplands of Louisiana. Experts investigate a forgotten war-torn fortress with a mysterious connection to the sinking ruins of a classified military installation.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien in Paradise
programme.desc: A bizarre, tentacled black mass emerges from the seas on an island in the Caribbean, and on-lookers are horrified as it writhes ashore; experts use cutting-edge tech to investigate the origin of this alien invader.

programme.desc: When experts spot what appears to be an abandoned city in the Caspian Sea, they investigate declassified Cold War evidence to reveal an Atlantis-like city built by the Soviets; what they find exposes its long-lost secrets.

programme.title: What on Earth?: America's Swamp Castle
programme.desc: Satellite images capture bizarre structures in the remote and inhospitable swamplands of Louisiana. Experts investigate a forgotten war-torn fortress with a mysterious connection to the sinking ruins of a classified military installation.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Treasures of Valhalla
programme.desc: When experts investigate an ancient network of tunnels rumored to be the hiding place of lost royal treasure, they find evidence of human sacrifice for the Viking god Odin. An abandoned fortress in Siberia might shed new light on Genghis Khan.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Mystery of the Cannibal Crypt
programme.desc: Mysterious tomb carvings provide dark evidence that ancient Egyptians practiced cannibalism, but we don't know why. New discoveries might finally answer this ancient mystery, and experts use modern-day tech to reveal more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Secrets of the Scorpion King
programme.desc: New evidence suggests that the mythological Scorpion King might have actually existed. New discoveries might answer this ancient mystery, and experts use modern-day tech to reveal more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Tut's Curse: The New Evidence
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal if King Tut's tomb is indeed cursed, as it is said to have killed nine people. The latest science might finally answer this ancient mystery, and experts use modern-day tech to investigate more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Ramses' Forbidden City
programme.desc: Explorers in search of a lost city built by Ramses II uncover startling evidence that reveals the extent of ancient Egypt's scientific knowledge, and the new discoveries at this strange site offer more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Curse of the Screaming Mummy
programme.desc: The Screaming Mummy is one of Egypt's greatest mysteries: a mummy with a terrifying expression frozen in agony. New discoveries reveal the connection between this horrific discovery and a pharaoh's murder, offering more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Armageddon on the Nile
programme.desc: Cataclysmic changes in ancient Egypt might have been caused by an extraordinary set of international phenomena, and the latest tech helps identify the supernatural culprit. What experts discover reveals a truth stranger than fiction.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: Mystery on Easter Island
programme.desc: Archaeologists have struggled for centuries to understand the ancient moai statues of Easter Island and the purpose behind their mysterious placement; now, experts use cutting-edge tech to finally reveal the hidden logic behind their cryptic locations.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: War of the Ancients
programme.desc: A gruesome archaeological discovery leads to a shocking excavation that uncovers ancient human carnage on a scale that's unparalleled; experts use 3-D bone modeling to reveal evidence of what may be the first catastrophic, major war in human history.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: Legend of the Cursed Temple
programme.desc: A temple to the Roman god of the underworld was the site of ritual sacrifice and a gate to the underworld, but it was buried because it was believed to be cursed. Experts use cutting-edge forensics to reveal what actually happened here.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: Secrets of Mayan Murders
programme.desc: Archaeologists excavating a historic Chilean site make a chilling discovery and find decapitated human skulls separate from a nearby burial site; experts use advanced cranial forensics to reveal what really happened to these ancient, butchered victims.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: Maze of Cryptic Terror
programme.desc: A team of explorers discover a forbidding cave system riddled with ancient markings that seem to contain a mysterious meaning; using advanced photogrammetry, experts finally decode these cryptic scrawls to expose a dark chapter of English history.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: Riddle of the Child Mummies
programme.desc: Archaeologists make a shocking discovery when the perfectly preserved remains of three children are unearthed from the frozen mountains of Argentina; using state-of-the-art forensics, experts investigate the bizarre circumstances behind this grisly scene.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: Tomb of the Red Queen
programme.desc: In an abandoned Maya city, an archaeologist discovers the tomb of a mysterious red skeleton decorated in jade and pearl treasures; experts use cutting-edge tech to reveal who this person was and why they were buried so.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: Murder on the Reservation
programme.desc: On the northern Cheyenne Indian reservation, a young mother goes missing after the Fourth of July. When her body is discovered in the woods, the victim's family dig through the memories of their loved one to provide investigators with critical clues.

programme.title: American Monster: By God, That's Enough
programme.desc: When single mom Michelle Chaffin finds love, it seems like the perfect case of opposites attract. But when Michelle vanishes without a trace, police uncover a terrible jealousy revealed through a shocking confession that leaves her family reeling.

programme.title: Diabolical: Recording Evil
programme.desc: Gina Coccia comes home from work to discover the bodies of her girlfriend Lynn, and Lynn's nephew, Ronnie, shot and stabbed on the kitchen floor. The investigation that follows will lead police, to a months long plot and a terrifying act of betrayal.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: The Watcher
programme.desc: On a rare day off from work, single mom Carrie Caudill and a friend embark on a well-deserved girl's night out. But out of nowhere, an unexpected confrontation puts Carrie on a dangerous collision course with a calculating and sadistic madman.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: There Will Be Blood
programme.desc: A 63-year-old man is gunned down in his own home just days before Christmas. As investigators in Spokane, Washington dig into the victim's business life in search of a motive, they uncover a host of shady deals and a few desperate men.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: The Enemy Upstairs
programme.desc: When a new tenant in a Harlem apartment building has his advances toward his upstairs neighbor rebuffed, his anger sets off a chain of accusations, threats, and fights that culminate in bloodshed and shocking tragedy.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Box On Her Doorstep
programme.desc: Each time she was targeted by an anonymous predator, Sarah Garone ran to her stepfather, Gary Hardy. She always felt something about Gary was creepy, but as the events got more disturbing, she never imagined someone trusted could be the one to hurt her.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: There Will Be Blood
programme.desc: A 63-year-old man is gunned down in his own home just days before Christmas. As investigators in Spokane, Washington dig into the victim's business life in search of a motive, they uncover a host of shady deals and a few desperate men.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: The Enemy Upstairs
programme.desc: When a new tenant in a Harlem apartment building has his advances toward his upstairs neighbor rebuffed, his anger sets off a chain of accusations, threats, and fights that culminate in bloodshed and shocking tragedy.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Poisoned by Love
programme.desc: Norma Hawkins grew up in fear of her mother, Shirley Allen. For years, Norma watched in horror while Shirley's anger destroyed those closest to her. But when people started dying, Norma had to find the courage to turn in her own mother to police.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Locked Away
programme.desc: After a college graduate goes missing from her parents' home, investigators must rely on quick thinking and cunning police work, as they race against the clock to find her before it's too late.

programme.title: Dead Silent: The Creek Bottom
programme.desc: College student and aspiring teacher Tammy Crowe has everything to live for, but on her way to a friend's dinner party, Tammy's life takes an unexpectedly devastating and violent turn.

programme.title: Dead Silent: The Curse of Dismal Creek
programme.desc: Sean Farmer travels to a remote campsite in Virginia for a fishing trip with his friend Scott Johnston. When a mysterious stranger appears, the area's dark past returns to haunt the campers.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: John Doe 57
programme.desc: When a tip from a missing person’s network helps identify the body of a John Doe murder victim, investigators question the victim's family and friends to find the killer, and ultimately unravel a dark tale of betrayal.

programme.title: The Missing: Missing Teens
programme.desc: A teenager goes for a bike ride and never comes back. Clues emerge, but nothing ever comes of it. Then, a teen goes out with friends and fails to return home to celebrate her mom's birthday.

programme.title: The Missing: Out the Door
programme.desc: Jesse Ross goes on a school trip to Chicago, but never returns to his hotel room. He is seen on video, but police find no trace of him. And then Alexis Scott leaves a party in Peoria, Illinois, but police can't track her down.

programme.title: Little Boy Lost: An ID Mystery
programme.desc: Jealousy, heartbreak and deceit. When 7-year-old Kyron Horman vanishes, investigators suspect his stepmother had a hand in his disappearance. In this one-hour special, Kyron's mother searches for answers as the family saga takes many bizarre turns.

programme.title: Disappeared: Walk Into Darkness
programme.desc: Tammy Kingery disappears after leaving work sick. Her family finds a note saying she's gone for a walk from their home in the woods, but searches yield no signs. An investigation reveals secrets that lead to dark theories about the mother of three.

programme.title: Disappeared: Gone In An Instant: Restless Spirits
Homicide Hunter: My, My Mysteries: Fight or Flight
Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Rearview Mirror
programme.desc: When a retired military man runs over a pedestrian, it's up to Lt. Joe Kenda to determine if it was bad brakes or bad intent. Then A shooting in a dive bar leads to a quick arrest, but Kenda can't quite shake the feeling that something is amiss.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: The Last Days of Phil Hartman
programme.desc: In the early hours of May 28, 1998, Phil's wife, Brynn, fatally shot him before she died by suicide. Now, over 20 years after their deaths, a two-hour ABC News television event details Phil's life, legacy and tragic murder.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: The Last Days of Phil Hartman
programme.desc: In the early hours of May 28, 1998, Phil's wife, Brynn, fatally shot him before she died by suicide. Now, over 20 years after their deaths, a two-hour ABC News television event details Phil's life, legacy and tragic murder.

programme.title: Chaos in Court: Hate Kills
programme.desc: A rumored hate crime disproven; a seasoned criminal gets a second chance; a defendant shouts an eerie message; a woman accused of attempted murder screams at a judge; and a man shoves a deputy then bolts.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Mothers Who Kill
programme.desc: These stories will shock you and make you wonder what would drive a woman to murder her own flesh and blood.

programme.title: Fear Thy Roommate: Doom For Rent
programme.desc: In order to make ends meet, a woman rents out a room in her home to a younger man. But when her finances are jeopardized, she invites another to live with them as well creating a toxic mix of suspicion, accusations, rage, and murder.
